---
title: "Étude d’implantation commerciale"
subtitle: "Projet d’ouverture d’un magasin BIO"
author: "Stave Icnel Dany OSIAS   ,   Loïc MÉMETEAU    ,   Arthur HAUGUEL"
date: "9 Avril 2026"
lang: fr

output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    theme: flatly
    social: menu
    source_code: embed

execute:
  echo: false
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
:root {
  --bg-page: #f3f6fb;
  --card-bg: #ffffff;
  --ink: #1d2a39;
  --muted: #5f6b7a;
  --accent: #0d5e8a;
  --accent-soft: #d8eaf5;
  --line: #dbe4ef;
}

body {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f8fbff 0%, var(--bg-page) 100%);
  color: var(--ink);
}

.navbar {
  background: linear-gradient(120deg, #0b486b 0%, #1a6ea0 55%, #2c8bb9 100%) !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
}

.navbar-default .navbar-brand,
.navbar-default .navbar-nav > li > a {
  color: #f8fbff !important;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* Force un collapse plus tot de la navbar pour eviter une barre sur 2-3 lignes */
@media (max-width: 1700px) {
  .navbar-header {
    float: none;
  }
  .navbar-left,
  .navbar-right {
    float: none !important;
  }
  .navbar-toggle {
    display: block;
  }
  .navbar-collapse {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
    box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  }
  .navbar-collapse.collapse {
    display: none !important;
  }
  .navbar-collapse.collapse.in {
    display: block !important;
    max-height: calc(100vh - 58px) !important;
    overflow-y: auto !important;
    overflow-x: hidden !important;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  }
  .navbar-collapse.in,
  .navbar-collapse.in .navbar-nav {
    max-height: calc(100vh - 58px);
    overflow-y: auto;
  }
  .navbar-nav {
    float: none !important;
    margin: 7.5px 0;
  }
  .navbar-nav > li {
    float: none;
  }
  .navbar-nav > li > a {
    padding-top: 9px;
    padding-bottom: 9px;
  }
}

.storyboard-nav .sbframelist ul li.active {
  border-left-color: var(--accent);
}

h1, h2, h3 {
  color: #16324a;
  letter-spacing: 0.1px;
}

h2 {
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--line);
  padding-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.section.level3 > h3 {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f6f9fd 100%);
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-left: 5px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  margin: 0.2rem 0 0.8rem 0;
  box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(22, 50, 74, 0.06);
}

.section {
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
}

.chart-wrapper {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 10px 12px 6px 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(14, 35, 56, 0.06);
}

.html-widget {
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.chart-wrapper .dataTables_wrapper,
.chart-wrapper .datatable,
.chart-wrapper .html-widget,
.chart-wrapper .kable-table,
.chart-wrapper .table-responsive {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.chart-wrapper .dataTables_scrollBody {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #dbe4ef !important;
}

.chart-wrapper .dataTables_scrollHead table,
.chart-wrapper .dataTables_scrollBody table {
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
}

.chart-wrapper table.dataTable thead th,
.chart-wrapper table.dataTable tbody td {
  text-align: left !important;
}

.chart-wrapper table.dataTable td.dt-nowrap,
.chart-wrapper table.dataTable th.dt-nowrap {
  white-space: nowrap;
}

table {
  border-collapse: separate;
  border-spacing: 0;
}

table thead th {
  background: #e9f2f9;
  color: #14324a;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #cfe0ee;
}

table tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
  background: #f8fbff;
}

p, li {
  color: var(--ink);
}

.caption,
figcaption {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}

.analysis-scroll-box {
  height: auto;
  max-height: 100%;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow-y: auto;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-left: 5px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.analysis-scroll-box--long {
  height: auto;
  max-height: 100%;
}

.analysis-scroll-box--ca-scroll {
  max-height: 620px;
  overflow-y: auto !important;
}

.analysis-scroll-box--fixed-scroll {
  height: 100%;
  max-height: none;
  overflow-y: auto !important;
}

.analysis-scroll-box p {
  margin: 0 0 0.65rem 0;
}

.analysis-scroll-box ul {
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.65rem;
}
```



```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ---------------------------
# Packages et options
# ---------------------------
# Librairie locale du projet pour les packages installes sans droits admin.
repo_candidates <- c(".", "..", "../..")
repo_root <- repo_candidates[file.exists(file.path(repo_candidates, ".git"))][1]
if (is.na(repo_root)) {
  repo_root <- repo_candidates[file.exists(file.path(repo_candidates, "Cours"))][1]
}
if (is.na(repo_root)) repo_root <- "."

project_lib <- normalizePath(file.path(repo_root, "Cours", ".Rlibs"), mustWork = FALSE)
if (!dir.exists(project_lib)) dir.create(project_lib, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
.libPaths(c(project_lib, .libPaths()))

library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
if (requireNamespace("plotly", quietly = TRUE)) {
  library(plotly)
}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center"
)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
theme_update(
  plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = "#15334b"),
  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, color = "#4b6073"),
  axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#1d2a39"),
  axis.text = element_text(color = "#334e68"),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
)

table_height_px <- function(df, min_px = 160, max_px = 520, row_px = 30, header_px = 56, footer_px = 18) {
  nr <- tryCatch(nrow(as.data.frame(df)), error = function(e) 0L)
  nc <- tryCatch(ncol(as.data.frame(df)), error = function(e) 0L)
  if (!is.finite(nr)) nr <- 0L
  if (!is.finite(nc)) nc <- 0L

  base_h <- header_px + footer_px + (as.integer(nr) * row_px)
  if (nc > 10) base_h <- base_h + 24

  h <- max(min_px, base_h)
  h <- min(max_px, h)
  as.integer(round(h))
}

render_scroll_table <- function(df, caption = NULL, height_px = 420, min_px = 160, nowrap = FALSE) {
  max_px <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(height_px))
  if (!is.finite(max_px)) max_px <- 520
  table_h <- table_height_px(df, min_px = min_px, max_px = max_px)
  col_defs <- if (isTRUE(nowrap)) list(list(targets = "_all", className = "dt-nowrap")) else list()

  if (requireNamespace("DT", quietly = TRUE)) {
    return(
      DT::datatable(
        df,
        rownames = FALSE,
        caption = if (is.null(caption)) NULL else htmltools::tags$caption(
          style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left;",
          caption
        ),
        options = list(
          dom = "t",
          paging = FALSE,
          searching = FALSE,
          info = FALSE,
          scrollX = TRUE,
          scrollY = paste0(table_h, "px"),
          autoWidth = FALSE,
          columnDefs = col_defs
        ),
        class = "compact stripe",
        width = "100%"
      )
    )
  }

  tb <- knitr::kable(df, format = "html", caption = caption)
  tb <- kableExtra::kable_styling(tb, full_width = TRUE, position = "left")
  kableExtra::scroll_box(tb, width = "100%", height = paste0(table_h, "px"))
}


# ---------------------------
# Fonction pour afficher un tableau de contingence proprement
# ---------------------------
afficher <- function(tab, colname, caption ="Tableau de contingence") {

  tab <- as.data.frame(tab)
  colnames(tab) <- c(colname, "Nombre")

  render_scroll_table(tab, caption = caption, height_px = 280)
}

coalesce_chr <- function(df, candidates) {
  out <- rep(NA_character_, nrow(df))
  for (col in candidates) {
    if (!col %in% names(df)) next
    val <- as.character(df[[col]])
    idx <- (is.na(out) | str_trim(out) == "") & !is.na(val) & str_trim(val) != ""
    out[idx] <- val[idx]
  }
  out
}

normalize_enseigne <- function(x) {
  out <- str_squish(as.character(x))
  out[out %in% c("", "[ND]", "Missing", "missing", "NA", "N/A", "NULL")] <- NA_character_
  out
}

normalize_naf <- function(x) {
  str_to_upper(str_replace_all(as.character(x), "[^A-Z0-9]", ""))
}

compute_coeff_alimentaire <- function(mediane_euro) {
  med <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(mediane_euro))
  dplyr::case_when(
    !is.finite(med) | med <= 0 ~ NA_real_,
    med < 15000 ~ 0.22,
    med < 20000 ~ 0.20,
    med < 25000 ~ 0.18,
    med < 30000 ~ 0.16,
    med < 35000 ~ 0.14,
    TRUE ~ 0.12
  )
}

normalize_commune <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- iconv(x, from = "", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  x <- str_to_upper(x)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[^A-Z0-9]", "")
  str_squish(x)
}

as_date_flexible <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_squish(x)
  x[x %in% c("", "NA", "N/A", "NULL")] <- NA_character_
  out <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x))
  miss <- is.na(out) & !is.na(x)
  if (any(miss)) out[miss] <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x[miss], format = "%d/%m/%Y"))
  miss <- is.na(out) & !is.na(x)
  if (any(miss)) out[miss] <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x[miss], format = "%Y-%m-%d"))
  out
}

extract_num_first <- function(x) {
  suppressWarnings(as.integer(str_extract(as.character(x), "\\d+")))
}

BIO_NAF5 <- c(
  "4721Z", "4722Z", "4723Z", "4724Z", "4725Z", "4729Z",
  "4781Z", "4789Z"
)
BIO_ENSEIGNE_REGEX <- "BIOCOOP|NATURALIA|LA\\s*VIE\\s*CLAIRE|VIE\\s*CLAIRE|SATORIZ|SO\\s*BIO|BIO\\s*C\\.?\\s*BON|DAY\\s*BY\\s*DAY|LABEL\\s*VIE|GREENWEEZ|KAZIDOMI|AURORE\\s*MARKET"
BIO_KEYWORDS_REGEX <- "\\bBIO\\b|VRAC|ORGANIC|NATURE"
BIO_SOURCE_KEYWORDS_REGEX <- "BIO|VRAC|ORGANIC|NATURE"

TYPE_PV_LEVELS <- c("bio_enseigne", "bio_local", "alim_specialise")
TYPE_PV_SHAPES_TM <- c(bio_enseigne = 21, bio_local = 24, alim_specialise = 22)
TYPE_PV_SHAPES_GG <- c(bio_enseigne = 16, bio_local = 17, alim_specialise = 15)

compute_bio_scope_flags <- function(df, naf_cols, classe_cols, enseigne_cols, denom_cols = character()) {
  naf_raw <- coalesce_chr(df, naf_cols)
  code_naf <- normalize_naf(naf_raw)
  naf5 <- substr(code_naf, 1, 5)

  enseigne_txt <- str_to_upper(str_squish(paste(
    coalesce_chr(df, enseigne_cols),
    coalesce_chr(df, denom_cols),
    sep = " | "
  )))
  source_txt <- str_to_upper(str_squish(paste(
    coalesce_chr(df, classe_cols),
    coalesce_chr(df, c("nomenclatur", "nomenclatur.1")),
    sep = " | "
  )))

  is_bio_enseigne <- str_detect(enseigne_txt, BIO_ENSEIGNE_REGEX)
  has_bio_keyword <- str_detect(enseigne_txt, BIO_KEYWORDS_REGEX)
  has_source_bio_keyword <- str_detect(source_txt, BIO_SOURCE_KEYWORDS_REGEX)
  keep_bio <- is_bio_enseigne |
    (naf5 %in% BIO_NAF5 & has_bio_keyword) |
    (naf5 %in% BIO_NAF5 & has_source_bio_keyword)

  dplyr::tibble(
    code_naf = code_naf,
    naf5 = naf5,
    is_bio_enseigne = is_bio_enseigne,
    has_bio_keyword = has_bio_keyword,
    has_source_bio_keyword = has_source_bio_keyword,
    keep_bio = keep_bio
  )
}

classify_type_pv <- function(df, naf_cols, classe_cols, enseigne_cols, denom_cols = character()) {
  flags <- compute_bio_scope_flags(
    df = df,
    naf_cols = naf_cols,
    classe_cols = classe_cols,
    enseigne_cols = enseigne_cols,
    denom_cols = denom_cols
  )

  out <- case_when(
    flags$is_bio_enseigne ~ "bio_enseigne",
    flags$naf5 %in% BIO_NAF5 & (flags$has_bio_keyword | flags$has_source_bio_keyword) ~ "bio_local",
    flags$naf5 %in% BIO_NAF5 ~ "alim_specialise",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )

  factor(out, levels = TYPE_PV_LEVELS)
}

separate_overlapping_points <- function(sf_points, offset_m = 20) {
  if (!inherits(sf_points, "sf") || nrow(sf_points) == 0) return(sf_points)

  geom_type <- unique(as.character(sf::st_geometry_type(sf_points, by_geometry = TRUE)))
  if (!all(geom_type %in% c("POINT", "MULTIPOINT"))) return(sf_points)

  crs_in <- sf::st_crs(sf_points)
  pts_3857 <- sf::st_transform(sf_points, 3857)
  coords <- sf::st_coordinates(pts_3857)

  # Cle coordonnee arrondie pour identifier les points strictement superposes.
  key <- paste(round(coords[, 1], 3), round(coords[, 2], 3), sep = "_")
  grp <- split(seq_len(nrow(pts_3857)), key)

  new_coords <- coords[, 1:2, drop = FALSE]
  for (idx in grp) {
    if (length(idx) <= 1) next
    n <- length(idx)
    angles <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = n + 1)[1:n]
    new_coords[idx, 1] <- coords[idx, 1] + offset_m * cos(angles)
    new_coords[idx, 2] <- coords[idx, 2] + offset_m * sin(angles)
  }

  sf::st_geometry(pts_3857) <- sf::st_sfc(
    lapply(seq_len(nrow(new_coords)), function(i) sf::st_point(new_coords[i, ])),
    crs = sf::st_crs(pts_3857)
  )

  sf::st_transform(pts_3857, crs_in)
}

map_group_reseau <- function(enseigne, denomination = NULL) {
  txt <- str_to_upper(str_squish(paste(enseigne, denomination, sep = " | ")))
  case_when(
    str_detect(txt, "CARREFOUR") ~ "Groupe Carrefour",
    str_detect(txt, "AUCHAN") ~ "Groupe Auchan",
    str_detect(txt, "CASINO|GEANT|MONOPRIX|SPAR|VIVAL") ~ "Groupe Casino",
    str_detect(txt, "INTERMARCHE|NETTO") ~ "Groupement Les Mousquetaires",
    str_detect(txt, "LECLERC|E\\.?\\s*LECLERC") ~ "E.Leclerc",
    str_detect(txt, "SUPER U|HYPER U|U EXPRESS|SYSTEME U|UTILE") ~ "Systeme U",
    str_detect(txt, "LIDL") ~ "Lidl",
    str_detect(txt, "ALDI") ~ "Aldi",
    TRUE ~ "Independant/Autre"
  )
}

sanitize_group_label <- function(x) {
  out <- normalize_enseigne(x)
  up <- str_to_upper(out)
  invalid_pattern <- paste(
    c(
      "COMMERCE", "ACTIVIT", "RESTAUR", "TRANSPORT", "LOCATION",
      "SERVICES", "CONSTRUCTION", "TRAVAUX", "NAF", "DETAIL EN MAGASIN",
      "AUTRE", "SANTE", "IMMOBILIER", "POSTE"
    ),
    collapse = "|"
  )
  out[is.na(out) | str_detect(up, invalid_pattern)] <- NA_character_
  out
}

compute_hhi <- function(group_vec) {
  x <- as.character(group_vec)
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & str_squish(x) != ""]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  n_tbl <- table(x)
  p <- as.numeric(n_tbl) / sum(n_tbl)
  sum(p^2)
}

build_sources_placeholder <- function(famille, variables_txt, utilite_txt) {
  tibble::tibble(
    famille_cartes = famille,
    variables = variables_txt,
    source_principale = "INSEE",
    utilite_ca_potentiel = utilite_txt
  )
}

compute_coverage_pct <- function(iris_sf, iso_sf, iris_id_col) {
  iris_base <- iris_sf %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(c(iris_id_col, "iris_name")), geometry) %>%
    mutate(iris_area = as.numeric(st_area(geometry)))

  if (is.null(iso_sf) || nrow(iso_sf) == 0) {
    return(
      iris_base %>%
        st_drop_geometry() %>%
        dplyr::transmute(
          !!iris_id_col := .data[[iris_id_col]],
          intersect_area = 0,
          couverture_pct = 0
        )
    )
  }

  sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)
  on.exit(sf::sf_use_s2(TRUE), add = TRUE)

  iso_valid <- st_make_valid(iso_sf)
  iso_union <- st_union(st_geometry(iso_valid))
  iso_union <- st_sf(id = 1, geometry = st_sfc(iso_union, crs = st_crs(iso_valid)))

  inter <- st_intersection(iris_base, iso_union)
  if (nrow(inter) == 0) {
    return(
      iris_base %>%
        st_drop_geometry() %>%
        dplyr::transmute(
          !!iris_id_col := .data[[iris_id_col]],
          intersect_area = 0,
          couverture_pct = 0
        )
    )
  }

  inter %>%
    mutate(intersect_area = as.numeric(st_area(geometry))) %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    group_by(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(iris_id_col))) %>%
    summarise(intersect_area = sum(intersect_area), .groups = "drop") %>%
    right_join(
      iris_base %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(c(iris_id_col, "iris_area"))),
      by = iris_id_col
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      intersect_area = ifelse(is.na(intersect_area), 0, intersect_area),
      couverture_pct = pmin(100, (intersect_area / iris_area) * 100)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(iris_id_col), intersect_area, couverture_pct)
}

connect_otp_any <- function(port_candidates = c(8080L, 8081L, 8082L, 8801L:8810L, 8901L:8910L)) {
  for (p in port_candidates) {
    con <- tryCatch(
      opentripplanner::otp_connect(hostname = "localhost", port = p),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (!is.null(con)) {
      attr(con, "otp_port") <- p
      message("Connexion OTP existante detectee sur le port ", p)
      return(con)
    }
  }
  NULL
}

get_env_int <- function(var_name, default = NA_integer_) {
  raw <- Sys.getenv(var_name, "")
  if (!nzchar(raw)) return(default)
  val <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(raw))
  if (is.na(val)) return(default)
  val
}

start_otp_any <- function(path_otp, path_data, start_ports = c(8901L:8910L, 8801L:8810L, 8080L:8089L)) {
  startup_wait_sec <- max(20L, get_env_int("OTP_STARTUP_WAIT_SEC", 90L))
  for (p in start_ports) {
    started <- tryCatch({
      opentripplanner::otp_setup(
        otp = path_otp,
        dir = path_data,
        port = p,
        securePort = as.integer(p + 100L),
        wait = FALSE,
        quiet = TRUE,
        open_browser = FALSE
      )
      TRUE
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("Echec demarrage OTP sur port ", p, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
      FALSE
    })

    if (!started) next

    con <- NULL
    for (i in seq_len(startup_wait_sec)) {
      Sys.sleep(1)
      con <- tryCatch(
        opentripplanner::otp_connect(hostname = "localhost", port = p),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      if (!is.null(con)) break
    }

    if (!is.null(con)) {
      attr(con, "otp_port") <- p
      message("OTP demarre et connecte sur le port ", p)
      return(con)
    }

    message("OTP non joignable sur le port ", p, " apres ", startup_wait_sec, "s, tentative port suivant.")
  }
  NULL
}

prepare_points_for_otp <- function(points_sf, id_col = "siret") {
  if (!inherits(points_sf, "sf")) stop("prepare_points_for_otp: objet sf attendu.")
  if (!id_col %in% names(points_sf)) stop("prepare_points_for_otp: colonne ID absente: ", id_col)

  n_before <- nrow(points_sf)
  out <- points_sf %>%
    mutate(
      !!id_col := as.character(.data[[id_col]])
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[id_col]]) & str_squish(.data[[id_col]]) != "")

  out <- out[!sf::st_is_empty(out), ]

  # On utilise les centroides pour garantir une matrice X/Y (un enregistrement par feature).
  coords <- suppressWarnings(sf::st_coordinates(sf::st_centroid(sf::st_geometry(out))))
  keep_xy <- stats::complete.cases(coords[, c("X", "Y"), drop = FALSE])
  out <- out[keep_xy, ]

  out <- out %>% distinct(.data[[id_col]], .keep_all = TRUE)
  n_after <- nrow(out)
  n_removed <- n_before - n_after

  if (n_removed > 0) {
    message("OTP: ", n_removed, " point(s) SIRENE retires (ID manquant, geometrie vide ou coordonnees NA).")
  }
  if (n_after == 0) {
    stop("OTP: aucun point valide apres nettoyage.")
  }

  out
}

normalize_iso_id_col <- function(iso_sf, id_col = "siret", known_ids = NULL) {
  if (is.null(iso_sf) || nrow(iso_sf) == 0) return(iso_sf)

  id_candidates <- c(id_col, "from_id", "fromId", "id", "otp_id", "siret")
  id_found <- id_candidates[id_candidates %in% names(iso_sf)]
  key_col <- if (length(id_found) > 0) id_found[[1]] else names(iso_sf)[min(3, ncol(iso_sf))]

  raw_id <- iso_sf[[key_col]]
  out_id <- as.character(raw_id)

  if (!is.null(known_ids)) {
    known_ids <- as.character(known_ids)
    known_ids <- known_ids[!is.na(known_ids) & str_squish(known_ids) != ""]

    if (length(known_ids) > 0 && !all(out_id %in% known_ids)) {
      id_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(raw_id))
      mapped <- rep(NA_character_, length(id_num))

      # Cas 1: OTP renvoie un index 1..n du batch courant.
      ok_1based <- !is.na(id_num) & id_num >= 1L & id_num <= length(known_ids)
      mapped[ok_1based] <- known_ids[id_num[ok_1based]]

      # Cas 2: OTP renvoie un index 0..(n-1).
      need_map <- is.na(mapped)
      ok_0based <- need_map & !is.na(id_num) & id_num >= 0L & id_num < length(known_ids)
      mapped[ok_0based] <- known_ids[id_num[ok_0based] + 1L]

      # Cas 3: identifiant texte se terminant par un numero (ex: "from_3").
      need_map <- is.na(mapped)
      if (any(need_map)) {
        parsed_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(str_extract(as.character(raw_id[need_map]), "\\d+$")))
        ok_parsed <- !is.na(parsed_num) & parsed_num >= 1L & parsed_num <= length(known_ids)
        if (any(ok_parsed)) {
          idx_need <- which(need_map)
          mapped[idx_need[ok_parsed]] <- known_ids[parsed_num[ok_parsed]]
        }
      }

      # Priorite aux IDs deja "propres"; sinon on prend le mapping deduit.
      direct_ok <- out_id %in% known_ids
      out_id <- ifelse(direct_ok, out_id, mapped)
    }
  }

  iso_sf[[id_col]] <- as.character(out_id)
  iso_sf
}

otp_isochrone_safe <- function(
    otpcon,
    points_sf,
    id_col = "siret",
    mode = c("CAR"),
    date_time,
    cutoffSec,
    maxWalkDistance = NULL,
    batch_size = 8L
) {
  if (nrow(points_sf) == 0) return(NULL)

  pts <- sf::st_transform(points_sf, 4326)
  request_timeout_sec <- max(20L, get_env_int("OTP_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SEC", 90L))
  batch_retries <- max(1L, get_env_int("OTP_BATCH_RETRIES", 2L))

  call_chunk <- function(pts_chunk) {
    args <- list(
      otpcon = otpcon,
      fromPlace = pts_chunk,
      fromID = as.character(pts_chunk[[id_col]]),
      mode = mode,
      date_time = date_time,
      cutoffSec = cutoffSec,
      ncores = 1
    )
    if (!is.null(maxWalkDistance)) args$maxWalkDistance <- maxWalkDistance

    for (attempt in seq_len(batch_retries)) {
      res <- tryCatch({
        setTimeLimit(elapsed = request_timeout_sec, transient = TRUE)
        on.exit(setTimeLimit(cpu = Inf, elapsed = Inf, transient = FALSE), add = TRUE)
        do.call(opentripplanner::otp_isochrone, args)
      }, error = function(e) {
        msg <- conditionMessage(e)
        message(
          "OTP erreur (mode=", paste(mode, collapse = "+"),
          ", attempt=", attempt, "/", batch_retries, "): ", msg
        )
        NULL
      })
      if (!is.null(res) && nrow(res) > 0) return(res)
      if (attempt < batch_retries) Sys.sleep(1)
    }
    NULL
  }

  old_timeout <- getOption("timeout")
  options(timeout = 60)
  on.exit(options(timeout = old_timeout), add = TRUE)

  idx_batches <- split(seq_len(nrow(pts)), ceiling(seq_len(nrow(pts)) / as.integer(batch_size)))
  out_parts <- list()

  for (b in seq_along(idx_batches)) {
    pts_chunk <- pts[idx_batches[[b]], ]
    message("OTP batch ", b, "/", length(idx_batches), " (", nrow(pts_chunk), " points, mode=", paste(mode, collapse = "+"), ")")
    res <- call_chunk(pts_chunk)
    if (!is.null(res) && nrow(res) > 0) {
      res <- normalize_iso_id_col(
        iso_sf = res,
        id_col = id_col,
        known_ids = as.character(pts_chunk[[id_col]])
      )
      out_parts[[length(out_parts) + 1]] <- res
    }
  }

  if (length(out_parts) == 0) {
    message("OTP sans resultat (mode=", paste(mode, collapse = "+"), ").")
    return(NULL)
  }

  out <- do.call(rbind, out_parts)
  normalize_iso_id_col(
    iso_sf = out,
    id_col = id_col,
    known_ids = as.character(pts[[id_col]])
  )
}

make_buffer_iso_fallback <- function(points_sf, id_col = "siret", cutoffSec, speed_m_per_min = 80) {
  if (nrow(points_sf) == 0) return(points_sf[0, ])

  pts <- st_transform(points_sf, 2154)
  ids <- as.character(pts[[id_col]])

  out_list <- vector("list", length = nrow(pts) * length(cutoffSec))
  k <- 0L

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(pts))) {
    for (tt in cutoffSec) {
      k <- k + 1L
      d_m <- (as.numeric(tt) / 60) * speed_m_per_min
      out_list[[k]] <- st_buffer(pts[i, ], dist = d_m) %>%
        mutate(
          !!id_col := ids[i],
          time = as.integer(tt)
        )
    }
  }

  iso <- do.call(rbind, out_list)
  st_transform(iso, st_crs(points_sf))
}

get_iso_specs <- function(profile = c("walk", "car")) {
  profile <- match.arg(profile)
  if (profile == "walk") {
    # Regles magasin BIO de proximite (priorite marche/velo/TC):
    # - bio_enseigne: 5-10 min
    # - bio_local: 5-10 min
    # - alim_specialise: 8-12 min
    return(list(
      bio_enseigne = c(5, 10) * 60,
      bio_local = c(5, 10) * 60,
      alim_specialise = c(8, 12) * 60
    ))
  }

  # Regles voiture (complement):
  # - bio_enseigne: 8-12 min
  # - bio_local: 8-12 min
  # - alim_specialise: 10-15 min
  list(
    bio_enseigne = c(8, 12) * 60,
    bio_local = c(8, 12) * 60,
    alim_specialise = c(10, 15) * 60
  )
}

build_multiformat_isochrones <- function(
    points_sf,
    otpcon = NULL,
    mode = c("CAR"),
    profile = c("car", "walk"),
    strict = TRUE,
    id_col = "siret",
    maxWalkDistance = NULL
) {
  profile <- match.arg(profile)
  specs <- get_iso_specs(profile)
  parts <- list()

  for (tp in names(specs)) {
    pts_tp <- points_sf %>% filter(as.character(Type_PV) == tp)
    if (nrow(pts_tp) == 0) next

    cut_tp <- specs[[tp]]
    iso_tp <- NULL

    if (!is.null(otpcon)) {
      iso_tp <- otp_isochrone_safe(
        otpcon = otpcon,
        points_sf = pts_tp,
        id_col = id_col,
        mode = mode,
        date_time = as.POSIXct(strptime("2026-02-18 08:35", "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")),
        cutoffSec = cut_tp,
        maxWalkDistance = maxWalkDistance,
        batch_size = 8L
      )
    }

    if (is.null(iso_tp) || nrow(iso_tp) == 0) {
      if (strict) {
        stop(
          "Aucune isochrone OTP pour type=", tp,
          " mode=", paste(mode, collapse = "+"),
          " profile=", profile
        )
      }
      message("Fallback geometrique pour type=", tp, " mode=", paste(mode, collapse = "+"))
      iso_tp <- make_buffer_iso_fallback(
        points_sf = pts_tp,
        id_col = id_col,
        cutoffSec = cut_tp,
        speed_m_per_min = if (profile == "car") 500 else 80
      )
    }

    iso_tp <- normalize_iso_id_col(
      iso_sf = iso_tp,
      id_col = id_col,
      known_ids = as.character(pts_tp[[id_col]])
    )
    iso_tp$Type_PV <- tp
    parts[[length(parts) + 1]] <- iso_tp
  }

  if (length(parts) == 0) {
    return(points_sf[0, ])
  }

  do.call(rbind, parts)
}

```


```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Chemins relatifs et création dossier processed
# ---------------------------
cours_dir_candidates <- c("Cours", ".", "..", "../..")
cours_dir <- cours_dir_candidates[
  file.exists(file.path(cours_dir_candidates, "data", "raw", "dataseed-sirene-1.shp"))
][1]

if (is.na(cours_dir)) stop("Dossier Cours/data/raw introuvable depuis: ", getwd())

raw_dir <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "raw")
processed_dir <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "processed")

# Créer le dossier si nécessaire
if (!dir.exists(processed_dir)) {
  dir.create(processed_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

message("Dossier Cours utilise: ", cours_dir)
```

PARTIE 2.1: Vue d'ensemble de la zone d’étude (agglo complete + zone cible Nord)
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=620}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r,results='hide'}
# ---------------------------
# Chargement shapefiles
# ---------------------------

# IRIS
iris_shp <- st_read(
  dsn = raw_dir,
  layer = "georef-france-iris-millesime"
)

# SIRENE
sirene_layer <- "dataseed-sirene-1"
sirene_dsn_candidates <- c(
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "actif"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "raw"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data")
)
sirene_dsn <- sirene_dsn_candidates[
  file.exists(file.path(sirene_dsn_candidates, paste0(sirene_layer, ".shp")))
][1]

if (is.na(sirene_dsn)) {
  stop("Shapefile ", sirene_layer, ".shp introuvable dans actif/raw/data.")
}

message("Source SIRENE utilisee: ", sirene_dsn, "/", sirene_layer, ".shp")

sirene_shp <- st_read(
  dsn = sirene_dsn,
  layer = sirene_layer,
  quiet = TRUE
)

message("Shapefile SIRENE charge avec succès: ", nrow(sirene_shp), " établissements")

# CSV avec plus de détails (optionnel selon les jeux de donnees disponibles)
sirene_csv_candidates <- c(
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "actif", "economicref-france-sirene-v3.csv"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "raw", "economicref-france-sirene-v3.csv"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "economicref-france-sirene-v3.csv")
)
sirene_csv_path <- sirene_csv_candidates[file.exists(sirene_csv_candidates)][1]

if (!is.na(sirene_csv_path)) {
  sirene_csv_raw <- suppressMessages(read_csv2(sirene_csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  names(sirene_csv_raw) <- tolower(names(sirene_csv_raw))

  siret_col <- if ("siret" %in% names(sirene_csv_raw)) "siret" else NA_character_
  denom_col <- names(sirene_csv_raw)[
    str_detect(
      names(sirene_csv_raw),
      "denomination usuelle|dénomination usuelle|denominatio"
    )
  ][1]
  enseigne_col <- names(sirene_csv_raw)[str_detect(names(sirene_csv_raw), "^enseigne")][1]

  if (is.na(siret_col)) {
    message("CSV SIRENE detecte mais colonne 'siret' absente: jointure CSV ignoree.")
    sirene_csv <- dplyr::tibble(
      siret = character(),
      denominatio_csv = character(),
      enseigne_de_csv = character()
    )
  } else {
    sirene_csv <- dplyr::tibble(
      siret = as.character(sirene_csv_raw[[siret_col]]),
      denominatio_csv = if (!is.na(denom_col)) as.character(sirene_csv_raw[[denom_col]]) else NA_character_,
      enseigne_de_csv = if (!is.na(enseigne_col)) as.character(sirene_csv_raw[[enseigne_col]]) else NA_character_
    )
    message("CSV SIRENE charge avec succès: ", nrow(sirene_csv), " établissements (", sirene_csv_path, ")")
  }
} else {
  message("CSV economicref-france-sirene-v3.csv introuvable (actif/raw/data). On continue sans enrichissement CSV.")
  sirene_csv <- dplyr::tibble(
    siret = character(),
    denominatio_csv = character(),
    enseigne_de_csv = character()
  )
}


```


```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Definition des perimetres (dual scope)
# ---------------------------
# Zone cible groupe (Nord) pour les analyses d'implantation.
communes_nord_norm <- c(
  "GRENOBLE", "MEYLAN", "LATRONCHE", "CORENC",
  "SAINTMARTINLEVINOUX", "SAINTEGREVE"
)
communes_ouest_norm <- c("SASSENAGE", "FONTAINE", "SEYSSINETPARISET", "SEYSSINS")
communes_sudest_norm <- c("ECHIROLLES", "EYBENS", "SAINTMARTINDHERES", "GIERES")

communes_agglo_norm <- unique(c(communes_nord_norm, communes_ouest_norm, communes_sudest_norm))
communes_zone_cible_norm <- communes_nord_norm

# Normaliser les noms de colonnes/communes
names(sirene_shp) <- tolower(names(sirene_shp))
iris_shp <- iris_shp %>% mutate(commune_norm = normalize_commune(com_name))
sirene_shp <- sirene_shp %>% mutate(commune_norm = normalize_commune(commune_de_))

prepare_sirene_scope <- function(sirene_sf) {
  out <- sirene_sf
  flags <- compute_bio_scope_flags(
    df = out,
    naf_cols = c("activite_pr.1", "activitepri.1", "activiteprincipaleetablissement", "activite_pr", "activitepri"),
    classe_cols = c("classe_de_l", "classeetabl", "classe"),
    enseigne_cols = c("enseigne_de", "enseigne1et"),
    denom_cols = c("denominatio", "denominatio.1")
  )
  out$code_naf <- flags$code_naf
  out$naf5 <- flags$naf5
  out$is_bio_enseigne <- flags$is_bio_enseigne
  out$has_bio_keyword <- flags$has_bio_keyword
  out$has_source_bio_keyword <- flags$has_source_bio_keyword
  out$keep_bio <- flags$keep_bio
  out$Type_PV <- classify_type_pv(
    df = out,
    naf_cols = c("activite_pr.1", "activitepri.1", "activiteprincipaleetablissement", "activite_pr", "activitepri"),
    classe_cols = c("classe_de_l", "classeetabl", "classe"),
    enseigne_cols = c("enseigne_de", "enseigne1et"),
    denom_cols = c("denominatio")
  )
  out %>% filter(keep_bio, !is.na(Type_PV))
}

# Perimetre complet agglo (table ponctuels)
sirene_agglo_full_raw <- sirene_shp %>% filter(commune_norm %in% communes_agglo_norm)
sirene_agglo_full <- prepare_sirene_scope(sirene_agglo_full_raw)

# Zone cible (Nord) pour cartes/analyses
sirene_zone_etude <- sirene_agglo_full %>% filter(commune_norm %in% communes_zone_cible_norm)

iris_agglo <- iris_shp %>% filter(commune_norm %in% communes_agglo_norm)
iris_zone_etude <- iris_agglo %>% filter(commune_norm %in% communes_zone_cible_norm)

message(
  "Filtre BIO agglo applique (enseigne/NAF5/mots-cles): ",
  nrow(sirene_agglo_full), " points conserves sur ", nrow(sirene_agglo_full_raw)
)
message(
  "Nombre de points BIO zone cible Nord: ", nrow(sirene_zone_etude),
  " | agglo complete: ", nrow(sirene_agglo_full)
)
message(
  "Detail 2025 zone cible Nord: ",
  paste(
    paste0(names(table(sirene_zone_etude$Type_PV)), "=", as.integer(table(sirene_zone_etude$Type_PV))),
    collapse = ", "
  )
)

if (nrow(sirene_zone_etude) == 0) {
  stop("Aucun point de vente BIO detecte dans la zone cible Nord apres filtrage BIO. Arret pour eviter un rendu invalide.")
}

```


### Répartition des établissements dans la zone d'étude
```{r}

# Création d'un tableau récapitulatif des types d'établissements
tab_classes <- as.data.frame(table(sirene_zone_etude$classe_de_l))
colnames(tab_classes) <- c("Type d'établissement", "Nombre")

render_scroll_table(
  tab_classes,
  caption = "Répartition des établissements dans la zone d'étude",
  height_px = 280
)


```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Remplir certaines valeurs manquantes a partir du CSV
# ---------------------------

# Convertir SIRET en character dans le CSV
sirene_csv <- sirene_csv %>%
  mutate(siret = as.character(siret))

# Vérifier également sirene_zone_etude
sirene_zone_etude <- sirene_zone_etude %>%
  mutate(siret = as.character(siret))
sirene_agglo_full <- sirene_agglo_full %>%
  mutate(siret = as.character(siret))

# Jointure sur SIRET
sirene_zone_etude <- sirene_zone_etude %>%
  left_join(sirene_csv, by = "siret") %>%
  mutate(
    denominatio = ifelse(is.na(denominatio) | denominatio == "", denominatio_csv, denominatio),
    enseigne_de = ifelse(is.na(enseigne_de) | enseigne_de == "", enseigne_de_csv, enseigne_de)
  ) %>%
  select(-denominatio_csv, -enseigne_de_csv)
sirene_agglo_full <- sirene_agglo_full %>%
  left_join(sirene_csv, by = "siret") %>%
  mutate(
    denominatio = ifelse(is.na(denominatio) | denominatio == "", denominatio_csv, denominatio),
    enseigne_de = ifelse(is.na(enseigne_de) | enseigne_de == "", enseigne_de_csv, enseigne_de)
  ) %>%
  select(-denominatio_csv, -enseigne_de_csv)

```



### Nombre de points de vente par enseigne

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Préparation table ponctuels (agglo complète)
# ---------------------------
sirene_agglo_tab <- st_transform(sirene_agglo_full, st_crs(iris_shp))

# Jointure spatiale IRIS (agglo complète)
joined_agglo <- st_join(
  sirene_agglo_tab,
  iris_shp %>% select(iris_code),
  left = TRUE
)
sirene_agglo_tab$Code_IRIS <- st_drop_geometry(joined_agglo)$iris_code

# Drives: priorite au crossref genere, fallback sur drives_grenoble.csv
crossref_candidates <- c(
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "processed", "crossref_supermarches_drives_zone_v3.csv"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "processed", "crossref_supermarches_drives_zone.csv"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "processed", "crossref_supermarches_drives.csv")
)
crossref_path <- crossref_candidates[file.exists(crossref_candidates)][1]

drive_info <- tibble(
  siret = character(),
  drive_trouve = logical(),
  drives_types = character(),
  date_creation_drive = as.Date(character())
)

if (!is.na(crossref_path)) {
  drive_info <- readr::read_csv(crossref_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    {
      date_drive_raw <- coalesce_chr(
        .,
        c(
          "date_creation_drive", "date_creation", "date_creation_drive_accole",
          "date_ouverture_drive", "date_ouverture", "date_drive"
        )
      )
      transmute(
        .,
        siret = as.character(siret),
        drive_trouve = as.logical(drive_trouve),
        drives_types = as.character(drives_types),
        date_creation_drive = as_date_flexible(date_drive_raw)
      )
    } %>%
    distinct(siret, .keep_all = TRUE)
} else {
  fallback_drive_path <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "raw", "drives_grenoble.csv")
  if (file.exists(fallback_drive_path)) {
    message("crossref drives absent: tentative de fallback avec drives_grenoble.csv")
    drives_raw <- suppressMessages(readr::read_delim(
      fallback_drive_path,
      delim = ";",
      show_col_types = FALSE,
      locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
    ))
    names(drives_raw) <- tolower(names(drives_raw))

    if ("adresse" %in% names(drives_raw)) {
      adr_m <- str_match(as.character(drives_raw$adresse), "^\\s*([^,]+),\\s*(\\d{5})\\s+(.+?)\\s*$")
      drives_raw <- drives_raw %>%
        mutate(
          cp_norm = adr_m[, 3],
          commune_norm = normalize_commune(adr_m[, 4]),
          numero_drive = extract_num_first(adr_m[, 2]),
          voie_drive = str_squish(str_remove(adr_m[, 2], "^[0-9]+\\s*")),
          voie_norm = normalize_commune(voie_drive),
          type_drive = if ("type_drive" %in% names(drives_raw)) as.character(type_drive) else "non_precise"
        )

      sirene_keys <- sirene_agglo_tab %>%
        st_drop_geometry() %>%
        transmute(
          siret = as.character(siret),
          cp_norm = str_extract(as.character(code_postal), "\\d{5}"),
          commune_norm = normalize_commune(commune_de_),
          numero_sirene = extract_num_first(numero_de_v),
          voie_norm = normalize_commune(paste(type_de_voi, libelle_de_))
        )

      fallback_match <- sirene_keys %>%
        inner_join(drives_raw, by = c("cp_norm", "commune_norm", "voie_norm")) %>%
        filter(is.na(numero_sirene) | is.na(numero_drive) | numero_sirene == numero_drive) %>%
        group_by(siret) %>%
        summarise(
          drive_trouve = TRUE,
          drives_types = paste(sort(unique(na.omit(type_drive))), collapse = " | "),
          date_creation_drive = as.Date(NA),
          .groups = "drop"
        )

      drive_info <- fallback_match
    }
  }
}

tab_ponctuels_raw <- sirene_agglo_tab %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

tab_ponctuels_raw$raison_sociale_raw <- coalesce_chr(
  tab_ponctuels_raw,
  c("denominatio", "denominatio.1", "denominatio.2", "denominatio.3", "denominatio.4")
)
tab_ponctuels_raw$enseigne_raw <- coalesce_chr(
  tab_ponctuels_raw,
  c("enseigne_de", "enseigne_de.1", "enseigne_de.2")
)
tab_ponctuels_raw$groupe_raw <- coalesce_chr(
  tab_ponctuels_raw,
  c("groupe_de_l", "groupe_de_l.1")
)

tab_ponctuels <- tab_ponctuels_raw %>%
  mutate(
    siret = as.character(siret),
    siren = as.character(siren),
    Raison_sociale_calc = normalize_enseigne(raison_sociale_raw),
    Nom_usuel_calc = normalize_enseigne(enseigne_raw),
    Nom_usuel_calc = ifelse(is.na(Nom_usuel_calc), Raison_sociale_calc, Nom_usuel_calc),
    Nom_usuel_source = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(normalize_enseigne(enseigne_raw)) ~ "enseigne_de",
      !is.na(normalize_enseigne(raison_sociale_raw)) ~ "denominatio",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Nom_usuel_alternatif = ifelse(
      !is.na(normalize_enseigne(enseigne_raw)) & !is.na(normalize_enseigne(raison_sociale_raw)) &
        normalize_enseigne(enseigne_raw) != normalize_enseigne(raison_sociale_raw),
      normalize_enseigne(raison_sociale_raw),
      NA_character_
    ),
    Nom_groupe_calc = sanitize_group_label(groupe_raw),
    Nom_groupe_calc = ifelse(
      is.na(Nom_groupe_calc),
      map_group_reseau(Nom_usuel_calc, Raison_sociale_calc),
      Nom_groupe_calc
    ),
    Nom_groupe_calc = ifelse(Nom_groupe_calc == "Independant/Autre", NA_character_, Nom_groupe_calc),
    Zone_etude_calc = commune_norm %in% communes_zone_cible_norm
  ) %>%
  left_join(drive_info, by = "siret") %>%
  mutate(
    drive_trouve = ifelse(is.na(drive_trouve), FALSE, drive_trouve),
    drives_types = ifelse(is.na(drives_types) | str_squish(drives_types) == "", "none", drives_types),
    Drive_accole = drive_trouve & str_detect(str_to_lower(drives_types), "accole|voiture"),
    Drive_deporte = drive_trouve & !Drive_accole,
    Date_creation_drive = as.character(as_date_flexible(date_creation_drive))
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    SIRET = siret,
    SIREN = siren,
    Raison_sociale = Raison_sociale_calc,
    Nom_usuel = Nom_usuel_calc,
    Nom_usuel_source = Nom_usuel_source,
    Nom_usuel_alternatif = Nom_usuel_alternatif,
    Date_changement_nom = as.character(as.Date(NA)),
    Flag_changement_nom = !is.na(Nom_usuel_alternatif),
    Siege = !is.na(siret_du_si) & siret == as.character(siret_du_si),
    Appartient_groupe = !is.na(Nom_groupe_calc),
    Nom_groupe = Nom_groupe_calc,
    Date_creation = as.character(as_date_flexible(date_de_cre)),
    Drive_accole = as.logical(Drive_accole),
    Date_creation_drive = Date_creation_drive,
    Drive_deporte = as.logical(Drive_deporte),
    Code_NAF = code_naf,
    Libelle_NAF = as.character(nomenclatur),
    Adresse = str_squish(paste(adresse_de_, code_postal, commune_de_, sep = ", ")),
    Code_IRIS = as.character(Code_IRIS),
    Zone_etude = as.logical(Zone_etude_calc)
  )

# ---------------------------
# Affichage récapitulatif
# ---------------------------
afficher(
  table(tab_ponctuels$Nom_usuel),
  colname = "Enseigne de l'établissement",
  caption = "Nombre de points de vente (agglo complète)"
)

```

PARTIE 2.2: Table des ponctuels
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Table des ponctuels


```{r}
render_scroll_table(
  head(tab_ponctuels),
  caption = "Aperçu de la table des ponctuels (agglo complète)",
  height_px = 320
)
```


```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Export CSV de la table des ponctuels
# ---------------------------

# Chemin du fichier de sortie
csv_file <- file.path(processed_dir, "GROUPE07_TabPonctuels_rapport2.csv")

# Export
write.csv(
  tab_ponctuels,
  csv_file,
  row.names = FALSE,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8",
  na = ""
)

message("CSV des points de vente exporté dans : ", csv_file)

```


PARTIE 2.2: Dictionnaire des variables
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Dictionnaire des variables

```{r}
infer_type <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return("logical")
  if (inherits(x, "Date")) return("date")
  if (is.integer(x)) return("integer")
  if (is.numeric(x)) return("numeric")
  "character"
}

desc_map <- c(
  SIRET = "Identifiant unique de l’établissement",
  SIREN = "Identifiant de l’unité légale",
  Raison_sociale = "Dénomination officielle de l’établissement",
  Nom_usuel = "Nom commercial/usuel retenu",
  Nom_usuel_source = "Variable source du nom usuel retenu",
  Nom_usuel_alternatif = "Nom alternatif utile au suivi des changements d’enseigne",
  Date_changement_nom = "Date de changement d’enseigne/dénomination (si connue)",
  Flag_changement_nom = "Indique une transition d’enseigne/dénomination",
  Siege = "Indique si l’établissement est siège",
  Appartient_groupe = "Appartenance à un groupe/réseau",
  Nom_groupe = "Nom du groupe commercial",
  Date_creation = "Date de création de l’établissement",
  Drive_accole = "Présence d’un drive accolé",
  Date_creation_drive = "Date de création du drive",
  Drive_deporte = "Présence d’un drive déporté",
  Code_NAF = "Code NAF de l’établissement",
  Libelle_NAF = "Libellé du code NAF",
  Adresse = "Adresse postale complète",
  Code_IRIS = "Code IRIS de localisation",
  Zone_etude = "True si point dans la zone cible Nord"
)

source_map <- c(
  SIRET = "SIRENE", SIREN = "SIRENE", Raison_sociale = "SIRENE",
  Nom_usuel = "SIRENE + nettoyage", Nom_usuel_source = "Traitement interne",
  Nom_usuel_alternatif = "SIRENE + traitement interne",
  Date_changement_nom = "A completer", Flag_changement_nom = "Traitement interne",
  Siege = "SIRENE", Appartient_groupe = "SIRENE + mapping groupe",
  Nom_groupe = "SIRENE + mapping groupe",
  Date_creation = "SIRENE", Drive_accole = "crossref drives / fallback",
  Date_creation_drive = "crossref drives / fallback",
  Drive_deporte = "crossref drives / fallback",
  Code_NAF = "SIRENE", Libelle_NAF = "SIRENE", Adresse = "SIRENE",
  Code_IRIS = "INSEE IRIS + jointure spatiale", Zone_etude = "Traitement interne"
)

rule_map <- c(
  SIRET = "Copie directe de siret",
  SIREN = "Copie directe de siren",
  Raison_sociale = "coalesce(denominatio, denominatio.*) puis normalize_enseigne(...)",
  Nom_usuel = "coalesce(enseigne_de, enseigne_de.*) sinon raison sociale",
  Nom_usuel_source = "enseigne_de si present sinon denominatio",
  Nom_usuel_alternatif = "denomination alternative si differente",
  Date_changement_nom = "Placeholder (source externe future)",
  Flag_changement_nom = "TRUE si nom usuel alternatif detecte",
  Siege = "siret == siret_du_si",
  Appartient_groupe = "Nom_groupe non NA",
  Nom_groupe = "groupe_de_l nettoye sinon mapping enseigne->groupe",
  Date_creation = "as_date_flexible(date_de_cre)",
  Drive_accole = "drive_trouve et type drive contient accole/voiture",
  Date_creation_drive = "date drive issue du crossref si disponible sinon NA",
  Drive_deporte = "drive_trouve et non drive_accole",
  Code_NAF = "normalize_naf(...)",
  Libelle_NAF = "Copie nomenclatur",
  Adresse = "concat(adresse_de_, code_postal, commune_de_)",
  Code_IRIS = "st_join point sur IRIS",
  Zone_etude = "commune_norm appartient a communes_nord_norm"
)

dico_base <- tibble(
  variable = names(tab_ponctuels),
  type = vapply(tab_ponctuels, infer_type, FUN.VALUE = character(1)),
  description = unname(desc_map[variable]),
  source = unname(source_map[variable]),
  regle_construction = unname(rule_map[variable])
) %>%
  mutate(
    description = ifelse(is.na(description), "A completer", description),
    source = ifelse(is.na(source), "A completer", source),
    regle_construction = ifelse(is.na(regle_construction), "A completer", regle_construction)
  )

dico_extra <- tibble::tribble(
  ~variable, ~type, ~description, ~source, ~regle_construction,
  "1er_quartile_euro", "numeric", "Premier quartile du revenu par IRIS", "INSEE IRIS", "Variable source IRIS",
  "Mediane_euro", "numeric", "Revenu median par IRIS", "INSEE IRIS", "Variable source IRIS",
  "3e_quartile_euro", "numeric", "Troisieme quartile du revenu par IRIS", "INSEE IRIS", "Variable source IRIS",
  "Pct_actifs", "numeric", "Part des actifs parmi les 15-64 ans", "INSEE IRIS", "Actifs_15-64_ans2 / Population_15-64_ans",
  "Pct_Menages_enfants", "numeric", "Part des menages avec enfants", "INSEE IRIS", "(Familles_princ_avec_enfants + Familles_monoparentales) / Menages",
  "Pct_Menages_voiture", "numeric", "Part des menages avec au moins une voiture", "INSEE IRIS", "Menages_une_voiture / Menages",
  "Pct_Cadres_sup", "numeric", "Part des cadres superieurs parmi les 15 ans et plus", "INSEE IRIS", "Pop_15_ansplus_Cadres_Prof_intel_sup / Population_15_ans_ou_plus",
  "Densite_pop", "numeric", "Densite de population", "INSEE IRIS + geometrie", "Population / surface IRIS (km2)",
  "Nb_pdv_2020", "numeric", "Nombre de points de vente BIO/alim_specialise par IRIS (2020)", "SIRENE 2020 + jointure IRIS", "Comptage par Code_IRIS",
  "Nb_pdv_2025", "numeric", "Nombre de points de vente BIO/alim_specialise par IRIS (2025)", "SIRENE 2025 + jointure IRIS", "Comptage par Code_IRIS",
  "Nb_drives_2025", "numeric", "Nombre de drives par IRIS (2025)", "crossref drives + jointure IRIS", "Comptage des points avec drive",
  "Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2020", "numeric", "Points accessibles en zone primaire voiture (2020)", "OTP/fallback + SIRENE 2020", "rowSums(st_intersects(IRIS, iso primaire))",
  "Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025", "numeric", "Points accessibles en zone primaire voiture (2025)", "OTP/fallback + SIRENE 2025", "rowSums(st_intersects(IRIS, iso primaire))",
  "Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture", "numeric", "Alias 2025 pour l'accessibilite primaire voiture", "Traitement interne", "Copie de Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025",
  "Nb_supermarches", "numeric", "Nombre de points de vente BIO/alim_specialise accessibles a pied (10 min)", "OTP/fallback", "rowSums(st_intersects(IRIS, iso600))",
  "couverture_pct_2020", "numeric", "Part de surface IRIS couverte (2020)", "OTP/fallback + calcul surfacique", "intersect_area / iris_area * 100",
  "couverture_pct_2025", "numeric", "Part de surface IRIS couverte (2025)", "OTP/fallback + calcul surfacique", "intersect_area / iris_area * 100",
  "couverture_pct", "numeric", "Alias 2025 de la couverture", "Traitement interne", "Copie de couverture_pct_2025",
  "moran_I", "numeric", "Indice global de Moran (accessibilite primaire)", "spdep + voisinage IRIS", "moran.test sur Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture",
  "moran_p_value", "numeric", "P-value associee a l'indice de Moran", "spdep + voisinage IRIS", "p.value du test de Moran",
  "HHI_2020", "numeric", "Indice Herfindahl-Hirschman par enseigne (2020)", "SIRENE 2020", "Somme des parts au carre",
  "HHI_2025", "numeric", "Indice Herfindahl-Hirschman par enseigne (2025)", "SIRENE 2025", "Somme des parts au carre",
  "score_total_A", "numeric", "Score classement A (socio-demo uniquement)", "Traitement interne", "Agregation ponderee variables tache 2.2",
  "score_total_B", "numeric", "Score classement B (socio-demo + concurrence)", "Traitement interne", "Agregation ponderee tache 2.2 + 2.3",
  "score_offre_gap_B", "numeric", "Sous-score d'insuffisance d'offre (classement B)", "Traitement interne", "Combinaison concurrence/couverture/drives",
  "rank_A", "numeric", "Rang selon classement A", "Traitement interne", "rank(-score_total_A)",
  "rank_B", "numeric", "Rang selon classement B", "Traitement interne", "rank(-score_total_B)",
  "delta_rang_A_B", "numeric", "Difference de rang entre classement A et B", "Traitement interne", "rank_A - rank_B"
)

dico_donnees <- bind_rows(dico_base, dico_extra) %>%
  distinct(variable, .keep_all = TRUE)

dico_csv <- file.path(processed_dir, "GROUPE07_DicoDonnées_rapport2.csv")
write.csv(
  dico_donnees,
  dico_csv,
  row.names = FALSE,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8",
  na = ""
)

render_scroll_table(
  dico_donnees,
  caption = "Dictionnaire des variables (vivant)",
  height_px = 520
)
```

PARTIE 2.1 : Zones de chalandise (cadre methodologique)
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Magasin BIO d’enseigne

Isochrones

- Pieton / velo / TC (principal)
  - Zone primaire : 5 a 10 min
  - Zone secondaire : 10 a 15 min
- Voiture (complement)
  - Zone primaire : 8 a 12 min
  - Zone secondaire : 12 a 15 min

Justification

Un magasin BIO specialise est un format de proximite: la chalandise doit privilegier les temps courts en marche/velo/TC. A Grenoble, l'usage du temps est plus robuste que la distance pour comparer l’accessibilite reelle. La voiture reste un mode de complement pour l’emport.


PARTIE 2.2 : Zones de chalandise (cadre methodologique)
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


### Commerce BIO local

Isochrones

- Pieton / velo (principal)
  - Zone primaire : 5 a 10 min
  - Zone secondaire : 10 a 15 min
- Transports en commun (complement)
  - Zone primaire : 15 a 20 min porte-a-porte
  - Zone secondaire : 20 a 30 min porte-a-porte
- Voiture (complement)
  - Zone primaire : 8 a 12 min
  - Zone secondaire : 12 a 15 min

Justification

Le commerce BIO local vise des achats recurrents et de proximite. Les seuils privilegient donc marche/velo/TC, puis la voiture comme extension. Cette hierarchie est coherente avec la logique de petit format et la structure urbaine de l’agglomeration grenobloise.


PARTIE 2.3 : Zones de chalandise (cadre methodologique)
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commerce alimentaire specialise (hors enseignes BIO)

Isochrones

- Pieton (principal)
  - Zone primaire : 8 min
  - Zone secondaire : 12 min
- Voiture (complement)
  - Zone primaire : 10 min
  - Zone secondaire : 15 min

Justification

Cette categorie represente des points specialises qui peuvent capter une demande BIO par proximite sans etre des enseignes BIO pures. Les seuils restent courts pour conserver une logique de bassin de vie local.

PARTIE 2.4 : Zones de chalandise (cadre methodologique)
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Parametrage retenu dans ce notebook (Partie 6)

- Bio d’enseigne: pieton 5-10 min; voiture 8-12 min
- Bio local: pieton 5-10 min; voiture 8-12 min
- Alimentaire specialise: pieton 8-12 min; voiture 10-15 min



### References bibliographiques

1. [Autorité de la concurrence (2025), Décision n° 24-DCC-288](https://www.autoritedelaconcurrence.fr/sites/default/files/integral_texts/2025-02/24-033%20-%20Publique%20-%20d%C3%A9cision%2024DCC288%20vf%20%2B%20Engagements.pdf)
2. [Autorité de la concurrence, La grande distribution à dominante alimentaire](https://www.autoritedelaconcurrence.fr/sites/default/files/doss_presse_10a26.pdf)
3. [AURG, Enquête Mobilités Grande Région Grenobloise (EMC²)](https://www.aurg.fr/13160-l-enquete-mobilites-grande-region-grenobloise-emc2.htm)
4. [SMMAG (2023), Observatoire vélo – Saisonnalité](https://smmag.fr/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/20230511_CS_5Min_Obsevatoire_Velo_saisonnalite.pdf)
5. [Cerema (2020), Grenoble Alpes Métropole – Observatoire des mobilités](https://www.cerema.fr/system/files/documents/2020/10/2020-10-13_grenoble-mple_obsmma.pdf)
6. [Cerema (2024), Densification & accessibilité – Grenoble](https://www.cerema.fr/fr/system/files?file=documents%2F2024%2F01%2F20220516_densif_grenoblemetro.pdf)
7. [MRAe AURA (2024), Cadrage – Plan de mobilités Grenoble Alpes Métropole](https://www.mrae.developpement-durable.gouv.fr/IMG/pdf/20240214_app1358_cadrage_pdmgrenoble_smmag_-_38_pour_publication.pdf)
8. [S-PASS TSE (2022), Les drives : Mission Bassin Minier](https://cdn.s-pass.org/SPASSDATA/attachments/2022_09/28/62863-les-drives-mission-bassin-minier.pdf)
9. [Grenoble Mag (2025), Congestion et vitesse moyenne](https://www.grenoblemag.com/article/2529/grenoble-12e-ville-francaise-la-plus-congestionnee-81-heures-perdues-dans-les-bouchons-en-2025)


PARTIE 3.1: Cartographie du premier quartile et du revenu median
=======================================================================

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Corrections sur les variables de revenus
# -----------------------------

# Donnes FILOSOFI pour remplacer les revenus nuls
filo <- read.csv(
  file.path(raw_dir, "BASE_TD_FILO_IRIS_2021_DISP.csv"),
  sep = ";",
  encoding = "Latin1"
)

# Renommer le code en Code_IRIS
colnames(filo)[colnames(filo) == "IRIS"] <- "Code_IRIS"
iris_zone_etude <- iris_zone_etude %>%
  rename(Code_IRIS = iris_code)

# Garder seulement les variables a corriger
filo <- filo[, c(
  "Code_IRIS",
  "DISP_Q121",
  "DISP_MED21",
  "DISP_Q321"
)]

filo$DISP_Q121 <- as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", filo$DISP_Q121))
filo$DISP_MED21 <- as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", filo$DISP_MED21))
filo$DISP_Q321 <- as.numeric(gsub(",", ".", filo$DISP_Q321))

# Donnees iris isere avec certains revenus nuls
iris_data <- read_excel(file.path(raw_dir, "iris_isere.xlsx"))
colnames(iris_data)[colnames(iris_data) == "CODE_IRIS"] <- "Code_IRIS"

# Conversion des codes IRIS en character
iris_zone_etude$Code_IRIS <- as.character(iris_zone_etude$Code_IRIS)
iris_data$Code_IRIS <- as.character(iris_data$Code_IRIS)
filo$Code_IRIS <- as.character(filo$Code_IRIS)


# Merge iris_data avec filo
iris_data <- iris_data %>%
  left_join(filo, by = "Code_IRIS") %>%
  mutate(
    `1er_quartile_euro` = ifelse(
      is.na(`1er_quartile_euro`) | `1er_quartile_euro` == 0,
      DISP_Q121,
      `1er_quartile_euro`
    ),
    Mediane_euro = ifelse(
      is.na(Mediane_euro) | Mediane_euro == 0,
      DISP_MED21,
      Mediane_euro
    ),
    `3e_quartile_euro` = ifelse(
      is.na(`3e_quartile_euro`) | `3e_quartile_euro` == 0,
      DISP_Q321,
      `3e_quartile_euro`
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-DISP_Q121, -DISP_MED21, -DISP_Q321)

```



```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Création des variables
# -----------------------------

# (1) Pourcentage d'actifs parmi les 15–64 ans
iris_data$Pct_actifs <- iris_data$`Actifs_15-64_ans2` /
                        iris_data$`Pop_15-64_ans`


# (2) Part de ménages avec enfants
iris_data$Pct_Menages_enfants <- (
  iris_data$Men_fam_princ_Couple_enfant_s +
  iris_data$Men_fam_princ_Famille_mono
) / iris_data$Menages

# (3) Part de ménages avec voiture
iris_data$Pct_Menages_voiture <- iris_data$Menages_une_voiture /
                                iris_data$Menages

# (4) Part de cadres supérieurs
iris_data$Pct_Cadres_sup <- iris_data$Pop_15_ansplus_Cadres_Prof_intel_sup /
                            iris_data$Pop_15_ansplus

# (5) Densité de population
iris_data$Densite_pop <- iris_data$Popution /
                         iris_data$Superficie


# -----------------------------
# Variables finales pour analyse
# -----------------------------
vars_a_garder <- c(
  "Code_IRIS",
  "Menages",
  "1er_quartile_euro",
  "Mediane_euro",
  "3e_quartile_euro",
  "Pct_actifs",
  "Pct_Menages_enfants",
  "Pct_Menages_voiture",
  "Pct_Cadres_sup",
  "Densite_pop"
)

# Merge avec la zone d’étude
iris_zone_etude <- merge(
  iris_zone_etude,
  iris_data[, vars_a_garder],
  by = "Code_IRIS",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Gestion des enseignes manquantes
sirene_zone_etude <- sirene_zone_etude %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Enseigne = as.character(enseigne_de),
    Enseigne = ifelse(is.na(Enseigne) | Enseigne == "", "ENSEIGNE_INCONNUE", Enseigne),
    Classe = classe_de_l
  )

sirene_zone_etude$groupe_reseau_nom <- map_group_reseau(
  sirene_zone_etude$Enseigne,
  sirene_zone_etude$denominatio
)

# Copie pour affichage cartographique: separation des points superposes
# afin d'eviter un sous-comptage visuel.
sirene_zone_etude_plot <- separate_overlapping_points(sirene_zone_etude, offset_m = 22)


```





```{r}
library(tmap)
library(tmaptools)
library(dplyr)

# Mode interactif
tmap_mode("view")
tmap_options(
  frame = FALSE,
  bg.color = "#f6f9fd"
)

# Fonction pour créer une carte avec id et popup
creer_carte <- function(sf_polygones, sf_points, var_poly, titre, palette="Blues") {
  
  # Séparation des points si nécessaire
  sf_points_plot <- separate_overlapping_points(sf_points, offset_m = 22)
  
  # Construire la carte tmap
  carte <- tm_shape(sf_polygones) +
    tm_text(text = "iris_name", size=0.8) +
    tm_polygons(
      col = var_poly,
      palette = palette,
      style = "quantile",
      n = 5,  
      alpha = 0.6,
      title = titre,
      id = "iris_name",
      popup.vars = var_poly
    ) +
    tm_shape(sf_points_plot) +
    tm_symbols(
      fill = "Enseigne",
      fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Enseigne"),
      shape = "Type_PV",
      shape.scale = tm_scale_categorical(values = TYPE_PV_SHAPES_TM),
      shape.legend = tm_legend(title = "Type point de vente"),
      col = "grey20",
      lwd = 0.4,
      size = 0.5,
      popup.vars = c("Enseigne", "Classe", "Type_PV")
    ) +
    tm_layout(title = titre, legend.outside = TRUE)
  
  return(carte)
}

plot_concurrence_map <- function(sirene_sf, title_txt) {
  sirene_sf_plot <- separate_overlapping_points(sirene_sf, offset_m = 22)
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = iris_zone_etude, fill = "grey97", color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.2) +
    geom_sf(
      data = sirene_sf_plot,
      aes(color = groupe_reseau_nom, shape = Type_PV),
      size = 2.2,
      alpha = 0.95
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      values = TYPE_PV_SHAPES_GG,
      drop = FALSE,
      name = "Type point de vente"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title_txt,
      subtitle = "Zone d'etude: Grenoble + communes Nord",
      color = "Groupe / reseau"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}


```

```{r}
# Création des cartes
# Cartes des revenus
map_1er_quartile <- creer_carte(iris_zone_etude, sirene_zone_etude, 
                                "1er_quartile_euro", "1er quartile du revenu (€)", "Blues")

map_mediane <- creer_carte(iris_zone_etude, sirene_zone_etude,
                           "Mediane_euro", "Médiane du revenu (€)", "Greens")

map_3e_quartile <- creer_carte(iris_zone_etude, sirene_zone_etude,
                               "3e_quartile_euro", "3e quartile du revenu (€)", "Oranges")


# Cartes des variables démographiques et socioéconomiques
map_actifs <- creer_carte(iris_zone_etude, sirene_zone_etude,
                          "Pct_actifs", "% Actifs 15-64 ans", "Blues")

map_menages_enfants <- creer_carte(iris_zone_etude, sirene_zone_etude,
                                   "Pct_Menages_enfants", "% Ménages avec enfants", "Greens")

map_menages_voiture <- creer_carte(iris_zone_etude, sirene_zone_etude,
                                   "Pct_Menages_voiture", "% Ménages avec voiture", "Oranges")

map_cadres <- creer_carte(iris_zone_etude, sirene_zone_etude,
                          "Pct_Cadres_sup", "% Cadres supérieurs", "Purples")

map_densite <- creer_carte(iris_zone_etude, sirene_zone_etude,
                           "Densite_pop", "Densité de population (hab/km²)", "Reds")
```

```{r}
# Controle de coherence des variables socio-demo (Task 2.2)
vars_req_12 <- c(
  "1er_quartile_euro", "Mediane_euro", "3e_quartile_euro",
  "Pct_actifs", "Pct_Menages_enfants", "Pct_Menages_voiture",
  "Pct_Cadres_sup", "Densite_pop"
)
vars_missing_12 <- setdiff(vars_req_12, names(iris_zone_etude))
if (length(vars_missing_12) > 0) {
  stop("Variables socio-demo manquantes pour la tache 2.2: ", paste(vars_missing_12, collapse = ", "))
}

pct_vars_12 <- c("Pct_actifs", "Pct_Menages_enfants", "Pct_Menages_voiture", "Pct_Cadres_sup")
checks_12 <- tibble::tibble(
  variable = vars_req_12,
  na_pct = round(
    vapply(vars_req_12, function(v) {
      x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude[[v]]))
      100 * mean(!is.finite(x))
    }, FUN.VALUE = numeric(1)),
    2
  ),
  min_val = vapply(vars_req_12, function(v) {
    x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude[[v]]))
    x <- x[is.finite(x)]
    if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else min(x)
  }, FUN.VALUE = numeric(1)),
  max_val = vapply(vars_req_12, function(v) {
    x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude[[v]]))
    x <- x[is.finite(x)]
    if (length(x) == 0) NA_real_ else max(x)
  }, FUN.VALUE = numeric(1))
) %>%
  mutate(
    plage_attendue = ifelse(variable %in% pct_vars_12, "[0, 1]", ">= 0"),
    flag_plage = dplyr::case_when(
      variable %in% pct_vars_12 ~ (is.na(min_val) | min_val >= 0) & (is.na(max_val) | max_val <= 1),
      TRUE ~ (is.na(min_val) | min_val >= 0)
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    min_val = ifelse(
      is.na(min_val),
      NA_character_,
      format(round(min_val, 2), scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE, nsmall = 2)
    ),
    max_val = ifelse(
      is.na(max_val),
      NA_character_,
      format(round(max_val, 2), scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE, nsmall = 2)
    )
  )

render_scroll_table(
  checks_12,
  caption = "Controle de coherence des variables socio-demo (zone cible)",
  height_px = 360
)
```

```{r}
render_scroll_table(
  build_sources_placeholder(
    famille = "Partie 3.1 - Revenus (Q1 et mediane)",
    variables_txt = "1er_quartile_euro, Mediane_euro",
    utilite_txt = "Qualifier le pouvoir d'achat local pour estimer le potentiel de chiffre d'affaires."
  ),
  caption = "Bloc standardise sources/justification",
  height_px = 200
)
```

PARTIE 4: Analyse de la concurrence
=======================================================================


```{r,results='hide'}
library(opentripplanner)

local_otp_jar <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "otp-1.5.0-shaded.jar")
path_otp <- if (file.exists(local_otp_jar)) local_otp_jar else otp_dl_jar()
otp_port <- NA_integer_
strict_isochrones <- Sys.getenv("STRICT_ISOCHRONES", "0") != "0"
otp_autostart <- Sys.getenv("OTP_AUTOSTART", "0") == "1"
otp_port_env <- get_env_int("OTP_PORT", NA_integer_)
otp_port_candidates <- unique(c(
  if (!is.na(otp_port_env)) otp_port_env else integer(),
  8081L, 8080L, 8082L, 8901L:8910L, 8801L:8810L
))
  
if (!exists("otpcon")) {
  path_data <- file.path(cours_dir, "data")
  graph_dir <- file.path(path_data, "graphs", "default")

  if (!dir.exists(graph_dir)) {
    dir.create(graph_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  }

  graph_obj_src <- file.path(path_data, "Graph.obj")
  graph_obj_dst <- file.path(graph_dir, "Graph.obj")
  if (!file.exists(graph_obj_dst) && file.exists(graph_obj_src)) {
    file.copy(graph_obj_src, graph_obj_dst)
  }
  if (!file.exists(graph_obj_dst)) {
    
    message("Graph.obj introuvable. Attendu dans ", graph_obj_src, " ou ", graph_obj_dst)
    
    # Construction de Graph.obj
    log <- otp_build_graph(otp = path_otp,
                           dir = path_data,memory=8000)
  }

  # Connexion OTP: reutilise uniquement un serveur deja actif.
  # Demarrage auto en second choix pour obtenir de vraies isochrones reseau.
  otpcon <- NULL
  if (!is.na(otp_port_env)) {
    otpcon <- tryCatch(
      opentripplanner::otp_connect(hostname = "localhost", port = otp_port_env),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (!is.null(otpcon)) {
      attr(otpcon, "otp_port") <- otp_port_env
      message("Connexion OTP forcee via OTP_PORT=", otp_port_env)
    } else {
      message("OTP_PORT=", otp_port_env, " non joignable, scan des ports usuels.")
    }
  }
  if (is.null(otpcon)) {
    otpcon <- connect_otp_any(port_candidates = otp_port_candidates)
  }
  if (is.null(otpcon) && otp_autostart) {
    start_ports <- unique(c(
      if (!is.na(otp_port_env)) otp_port_env else integer(),
      8901L, 8081L
    ))
    otpcon <- start_otp_any(
      path_otp = path_otp,
      path_data = path_data,
      start_ports = start_ports
    )
  }
  if (is.null(otpcon)) {
    if (otp_autostart) {
      message("Aucun serveur OTP actif/demarrable detecte. Fallback geometrique actif.")
    } else {
      message("Aucun serveur OTP actif detecte (OTP_AUTOSTART=0).")
    }
  }
}

if (!is.null(otpcon)) {
  otp_port <- attr(otpcon, "otp_port")
  if (is.null(otp_port) || is.na(otp_port)) otp_port <- 8080L
  message("Port OTP retenu pour la suite: ", otp_port)
} else if (strict_isochrones) {
  stop("OTP indisponible et STRICT_ISOCHRONES=1: impossible de produire de vraies isochrones.")
}
```


```{r, results='hide'}
# SIRENE
sirene_layer_avant <- "dataseed-sirene-2"
sirene_dsn_avant_candidates <- c(
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "raw"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "actif"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data")
)
sirene_dsn_avant <- sirene_dsn_avant_candidates[
  file.exists(file.path(sirene_dsn_avant_candidates, paste0(sirene_layer_avant, ".shp")))
][1]
if (is.na(sirene_dsn_avant)) {
  stop("Shapefile ", sirene_layer_avant, ".shp introuvable dans raw/actif/data.")
}

message("Source SIRENE (avant 2025) utilisee: ", sirene_dsn_avant, "/", sirene_layer_avant, ".shp")

sirene_shp_avant <- st_read(
  dsn = sirene_dsn_avant,
  layer = sirene_layer_avant,
  quiet = TRUE
)

message("Shapefile SIRENE charge avec succès: ", nrow(sirene_shp_avant), " établissements")


```

```{r}
sirene_zone_avant <- sirene_shp_avant %>%
  mutate(commune_norm = normalize_commune(libellecomm)) %>%
  filter(commune_norm %in% communes_zone_cible_norm & etatadminis == "Actif")

# Créer des identifiants clairs pour les points
sirene_zone_avant <- sirene_zone_avant %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Enseigne = ifelse(is.na(enseigne1et) | enseigne1et=="", "ENSEIGNE_INCONNUE", enseigne1et),
    Classe = classeetabl
  )

sirene_zone_avant$code_naf <- normalize_naf(coalesce_chr(
  sirene_zone_avant,
  c("activitepri.1", "activite_pr.1", "activiteprincipaleetablissement", "activitepri", "activite_pr")
))
scope_flags_2020 <- compute_bio_scope_flags(
  df = sirene_zone_avant,
  naf_cols = c("activitepri.1", "activite_pr.1", "activitepri_1", "activiteprincipaleetablissement", "activitepri"),
  classe_cols = c("classeetabl", "classe_de_l", "classe"),
  enseigne_cols = c("Enseigne", "enseigne1et"),
  denom_cols = c("denominatio", "denomination")
)
sirene_zone_avant$naf5 <- scope_flags_2020$naf5
sirene_zone_avant$is_bio_enseigne <- scope_flags_2020$is_bio_enseigne
sirene_zone_avant$has_bio_keyword <- scope_flags_2020$has_bio_keyword
sirene_zone_avant$has_source_bio_keyword <- scope_flags_2020$has_source_bio_keyword
sirene_zone_avant$keep_bio <- scope_flags_2020$keep_bio
sirene_zone_avant$Type_PV <- classify_type_pv(
  df = sirene_zone_avant,
  naf_cols = c("activitepri.1", "activite_pr.1", "activitepri_1", "activiteprincipaleetablissement", "activitepri"),
  classe_cols = c("classeetabl", "classe_de_l", "classe"),
  enseigne_cols = c("Enseigne", "enseigne1et"),
  denom_cols = c("denominatio", "denomination")
)

n_avant_before_naf <- nrow(sirene_zone_avant)
sirene_zone_avant <- sirene_zone_avant %>%
  filter(keep_bio, !is.na(Type_PV))
n_avant_after_naf <- nrow(sirene_zone_avant)
message(
  "Filtre BIO 2020 applique (enseigne/NAF5/mots-cles): ",
  n_avant_after_naf, " points conserves sur ", n_avant_before_naf
)

sirene_zone_avant$groupe_reseau_nom <- map_group_reseau(
  sirene_zone_avant$Enseigne,
  coalesce_chr(sirene_zone_avant, c("denominatio", "denomination"))
)

```



```{r}
# Joindre points aux polygones IRIS (zone cible)
iris_id_col <- if ("Code_IRIS" %in% names(iris_zone_etude)) "Code_IRIS" else "iris_code"

sirene_zone_avant <- st_transform(sirene_zone_avant, st_crs(iris_zone_etude))
sirene_zone_etude <- st_transform(sirene_zone_etude, st_crs(iris_zone_etude))

joined_2020 <- st_join(
  sirene_zone_avant,
  iris_zone_etude %>% dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(iris_id_col)),
  left = TRUE
)
joined_2025 <- st_join(
  sirene_zone_etude,
  iris_zone_etude %>% dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(iris_id_col)),
  left = TRUE
)

sirene_zone_avant$Code_IRIS <- as.character(st_drop_geometry(joined_2020)[[iris_id_col]])
sirene_zone_etude$Code_IRIS <- as.character(st_drop_geometry(joined_2025)[[iris_id_col]])

# Comptage total des points de vente par IRIS (zone cible)
compte_avant <- sirene_zone_avant %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(Code_IRIS) %>%
  summarise(Nb_pdv_2020 = n(), .groups = "drop")

compte_2025 <- sirene_zone_etude %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(Code_IRIS) %>%
  summarise(Nb_pdv_2025 = n(), .groups = "drop")


```

```{r}
iris_zone_etude <- iris_zone_etude %>%
  left_join(compte_avant, by = "Code_IRIS") %>%
  left_join(compte_2025, by = "Code_IRIS") %>%
  mutate(
    Nb_pdv_2020 = coalesce(Nb_pdv_2020, 0L),
    Nb_pdv_2025 = coalesce(Nb_pdv_2025, 0L)
  )

```



```{r}
# Carte 2020
map_avant <- plot_concurrence_map(
  sirene_zone_avant,
  "Concurrence BIO/specialise - 2020 (dataseed-sirene-2)"
)

# Carte 2025
map_2025 <- plot_concurrence_map(
  sirene_zone_etude,
  "Concurrence BIO/specialise - 2025 (dataseed-sirene-1)"
)
```

Row {data-height=620}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Cartographie des Points de vente en 2020

```{r}
map_avant
```


### Cartographie des Points de vente en 2025

```{r}
map_2025
```

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Comptage IRIS BIO/alimentaire specialise 2020

```{r}
nb_vals_iris <- c(
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_2020)),
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_2025))
)
nb_vals_iris <- nb_vals_iris[is.finite(nb_vals_iris)]
max_nb_iris <- if (length(nb_vals_iris) == 0) 1 else max(1, ceiling(max(nb_vals_iris)))
comp_breaks_iris <- c(-0.1, seq(0.5, max_nb_iris + 0.5, by = 1))
comp_labels_iris <- as.character(0:max_nb_iris)

tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = "Nb_pdv_2020",
    palette = "YlGnBu",
    style = "fixed",
    breaks = comp_breaks_iris,
    labels = comp_labels_iris,
    id = "iris_name",
    title = "Nb points de vente"
  ) +
  tm_text("iris_name", size = 0.75) +
  tm_layout(title = "Comptage par IRIS - 2020", legend.outside = TRUE)
```

### Comptage IRIS BIO/alimentaire specialise 2025

```{r}
tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = "Nb_pdv_2025",
    palette = "YlGnBu",
    style = "fixed",
    breaks = comp_breaks_iris,
    labels = comp_labels_iris,
    id = "iris_name",
    title = "Nb points de vente"
  ) +
  tm_text("iris_name", size = 0.75) +
  tm_layout(title = "Comptage par IRIS - 2025", legend.outside = TRUE)
```

Row {data-height=520}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>

Row {data-height=460}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Transitions d’enseigne 2020 → 2025 (SIRET commun)

```{r}
transitions_enseigne <- full_join(
  sirene_zone_avant %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    transmute(
      siret = as.character(siret),
      enseigne_2020 = normalize_enseigne(Enseigne),
      type_pv_2020 = as.character(Type_PV)
    ),
  sirene_zone_etude %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    transmute(
      siret = as.character(siret),
      enseigne_2025 = normalize_enseigne(Enseigne),
      type_pv_2025 = as.character(Type_PV)
    ),
  by = "siret"
) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(siret),
    !is.na(enseigne_2020),
    !is.na(enseigne_2025),
    enseigne_2020 != enseigne_2025
  ) %>%
  arrange(enseigne_2020, enseigne_2025)

if (nrow(transitions_enseigne) == 0) {
  render_scroll_table(
    data.frame(Info = "Aucune transition détectée sur SIRET communs."),
    caption = "Transitions enseigne",
    height_px = 220,
    nowrap = TRUE
  )
} else {
  render_scroll_table(
    head(transitions_enseigne, 40),
    caption = "Transitions d’enseigne détectées (extrait)",
    height_px = 300,
    nowrap = TRUE
  )
}
```

PARTIE 4.1: Comparaison BIO physique vs e-commerce/circuits alternatifs (2025)
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
# Base 2025: points BIO physiques conserves
bio_physique_2025 <- sirene_zone_etude %>%
  filter(as.character(Type_PV) %in% TYPE_PV_LEVELS) %>%
  mutate(
    siret_chr = as.character(siret),
    siret = as.character(siret)
  )

# 1) Couche "alternatifs" issue du crossref drives (proxy retrait/e-commerce)
crossref_candidates <- c(
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "processed", "crossref_supermarches_drives_zone_v3.csv"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "processed", "crossref_supermarches_drives_zone.csv"),
  file.path(cours_dir, "data", "processed", "crossref_supermarches_drives.csv")
)
crossref_path <- crossref_candidates[file.exists(crossref_candidates)][1]

if (is.na(crossref_path)) {
  message("Aucun fichier crossref drives trouve dans data/processed. Couche alternatifs crossref vide.")
  alt_drive_2025 <- bio_physique_2025[0, ] %>%
    mutate(type_alternatif = character(), source_alt = character(), match_method = character())
} else {
  crossref_drives <- readr::read_csv(crossref_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      siret_chr = as.character(siret),
      drive_trouve = as.logical(drive_trouve),
      drives_types = ifelse(
        is.na(drives_types) | str_squish(as.character(drives_types)) == "",
        "non_precise",
        as.character(drives_types)
      ),
      match_method = as.character(match_method)
    ) %>%
    filter(drive_trouve %in% TRUE) %>%
    distinct(siret_chr, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(siret_chr, drives_types, match_method)

  alt_drive_2025 <- bio_physique_2025 %>%
    inner_join(crossref_drives, by = "siret_chr") %>%
    mutate(
      type_alternatif = "drive_retrait",
      source_alt = "crossref_drives"
    ) %>%
    distinct(siret_chr, .keep_all = TRUE)
}

# 2) Couche "alternatifs" externe (optionnelle): e-commerce / circuits alternatifs
alt_raw_candidates <- c(
  file.path(raw_dir, "bio_ecommerce_circuits_alternatifs.csv"),
  file.path(raw_dir, "ecommerce_circuits_alternatifs.csv"),
  file.path(raw_dir, "circuits_alternatifs_bio.csv")
)
alt_raw_path <- alt_raw_candidates[file.exists(alt_raw_candidates)][1]

alt_externe_2025 <- bio_physique_2025[0, ] %>%
  mutate(
    acteur_alt = character(),
    type_alternatif = character(),
    source_alt = character(),
    match_method = character()
  )

if (!is.na(alt_raw_path)) {
  alt_raw <- suppressMessages(readr::read_delim(
    alt_raw_path,
    delim = ";",
    col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character()),
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8"),
    trim_ws = TRUE
  ))
  names(alt_raw) <- tolower(names(alt_raw))

  siret_col <- names(alt_raw)[str_detect(names(alt_raw), "^siret$|siret14")][1]
  acteur_col <- names(alt_raw)[str_detect(names(alt_raw), "acteur|enseigne|nom")][1]
  type_col <- names(alt_raw)[str_detect(names(alt_raw), "type|canal|mode")][1]

  if (!is.na(siret_col)) {
    alt_match <- alt_raw %>%
      mutate(siret_chr = as.character(.data[[siret_col]])) %>%
      filter(!is.na(siret_chr), str_squish(siret_chr) != "") %>%
      distinct(siret_chr, .keep_all = TRUE)

    alt_externe_2025 <- bio_physique_2025 %>%
      inner_join(alt_match, by = "siret_chr") %>%
      mutate(
        acteur_alt = if (!is.na(acteur_col)) as.character(.data[[acteur_col]]) else as.character(Enseigne),
        type_alternatif = if (!is.na(type_col)) as.character(.data[[type_col]]) else "alternatif_externe",
        source_alt = "fichier_externe",
        match_method = "siret"
      ) %>%
      distinct(siret_chr, .keep_all = TRUE)
  }
}

alternatifs_2025 <- bind_rows(
  alt_drive_2025 %>%
```
