```{r}
    mutate(acteur_alt = as.character(Enseigne)),
  alt_externe_2025
) %>%
  distinct(siret_chr, type_alternatif, source_alt, .keep_all = TRUE)

message(
  "Comparaison BIO physique vs e-commerce/circuits alternatifs (2025): ",
  nrow(bio_physique_2025), " points BIO physiques, ",
  nrow(alternatifs_2025), " points alternatifs."
)

if (nrow(alternatifs_2025) > 0) {
  iris_join_key <- "iris_join_code"
  alt_join <- st_join(
    alternatifs_2025,
    iris_zone_etude %>%
      mutate(!!iris_join_key := as.character(.data[[iris_id_col]])) %>%
      dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(iris_join_key)),
    left = TRUE
  )
  alternatifs_2025$Code_IRIS <- as.character(st_drop_geometry(alt_join)[[iris_join_key]])
} else {
  alternatifs_2025$Code_IRIS <- character(0)
}

compte_alternatifs_2025 <- alternatifs_2025 %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  filter(!is.na(Code_IRIS) & str_squish(Code_IRIS) != "") %>%
  group_by(Code_IRIS) %>%
  # Conservation du nom historique pour compatibilite scoring
  summarise(Nb_drives_2025 = n(), .groups = "drop")

if (!"Code_IRIS" %in% names(iris_zone_etude) && iris_id_col %in% names(iris_zone_etude)) {
  iris_zone_etude <- iris_zone_etude %>% mutate(Code_IRIS = as.character(.data[[iris_id_col]]))
}

iris_zone_etude <- iris_zone_etude %>%
  dplyr::select(-any_of("Nb_drives_2025")) %>%
  left_join(compte_alternatifs_2025, by = "Code_IRIS") %>%
  mutate(Nb_drives_2025 = coalesce(as.integer(Nb_drives_2025), 0L))

bio_physique_2025_plot <- separate_overlapping_points(bio_physique_2025, offset_m = 22)
alternatifs_2025_plot <- separate_overlapping_points(alternatifs_2025, offset_m = 28)

map_bio_vs_alternatifs <- tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
  tm_borders(col = "grey65", lwd = 1) +
  tm_fill(alpha = 0) +
  tm_shape(bio_physique_2025_plot) +
  tm_symbols(
    shape = "Type_PV",
    shape.scale = tm_scale_categorical(values = TYPE_PV_SHAPES_TM),
    fill = "#7B8794",
    col = "#334E68",
    lwd = 0.6,
    size = 0.45,
    popup.vars = c("siret", "Enseigne", "Type_PV", "groupe_reseau_nom")
  ) +
  tm_layout(
    title = "BIO physique (2025) vs e-commerce/circuits alternatifs",
    legend.outside = TRUE
  ) +
  tm_add_legend(
    type = "symbol",
    labels = c("BIO physique (2025)"),
    shape = c(21),
    col = c("#334E68"),
    fill = c("#7B8794"),
    title = "Couches"
  )

if (nrow(alternatifs_2025_plot) > 0) {
  map_bio_vs_alternatifs <- map_bio_vs_alternatifs +
    tm_shape(alternatifs_2025_plot) +
    tm_symbols(
      shape = 4,
      fill = "#00A6FB",
      col = "#003049",
      lwd = 1,
      size = 0.85,
      popup.vars = c("siret", "Enseigne", "Type_PV", "type_alternatif", "source_alt", "match_method")
    ) +
    tm_add_legend(
      type = "symbol",
      labels = c("E-commerce / circuits alternatifs"),
      shape = c(4),
      col = c("#003049"),
      fill = c("#00A6FB"),
      title = "Couches"
    )
}
```

### Carte comparative: BIO physique vs e-commerce/circuits alternatifs

```{r}
map_bio_vs_alternatifs
```

### Comptage IRIS e-commerce/circuits alternatifs 2025

```{r}
iris_zone_etude <- iris_zone_etude %>%
  mutate(Nb_alternatifs_2025_map = as.numeric(coalesce(Nb_drives_2025, 0)))

tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = "Nb_alternatifs_2025_map",
    palette = "PuBu",
    style = "fixed",
    breaks = c(-0.1, 0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 4.5, Inf),
    labels = c("0", "1", "2", "3-4", "5+"),
    id = "iris_name",
    title = "Nb alternatives 2025"
  ) +
  tm_text("iris_name", size = 0.75) +
  tm_layout(title = "Comptage e-commerce/circuits alternatifs par IRIS - 2025", legend.outside = TRUE)
```

Row {data-height=500}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>

PARTIE 5: Zones de chalandises en 2025
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r,results='hide'}
if (!is.null(otpcon) && !is.na(otp_port)) {
  otpcon <- tryCatch(
    otp_connect(hostname = "localhost", port = otp_port),
    error = function(e) otpcon
  )
}

sirene_zone_etude_otp <- prepare_points_for_otp(sirene_zone_etude, id_col = "siret")
sirene_zone_etude_iso_plot <- sirene_zone_etude_otp %>%
  st_transform(st_crs(iris_zone_etude)) %>%
  separate_overlapping_points(offset_m = 22)

iso <- build_multiformat_isochrones(
  points_sf = sirene_zone_etude_otp,
  otpcon = otpcon,
  mode = c("WALK"),
  profile = "walk",
  strict = strict_isochrones,
  id_col = "siret",
  maxWalkDistance = 1500
)

ref_enseigne <- sirene_zone_etude_otp %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  dplyr::select(siret, Enseigne) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

iso <- iso %>%
  dplyr::left_join(ref_enseigne, by = "siret") %>%
  dplyr::distinct()
iso$minutes <- iso$time / 60

```
### Zones de chalandise (à pied)

```{r}
tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = "Pct_actifs",
    alpha = 0.5,
    style = "pretty",
    palette = "Greens",
    id = "iris_name",
    title = "% Actifs 15-64 ans"
  ) +
  tm_shape(iso) +
  tm_fill(
    "minutes",
    breaks = c(0, 5.01, 8.01, 10.01),
    title = "Isochrones (minutes)",
    style = "fixed",
    labels = c("0 a 5", "5 a 8 (acces reseau BIO)", "8 a 10"),
    palette = "Reds",
    id = "minutes",
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  tm_borders() +
  tm_shape(sirene_zone_etude_iso_plot) +
  tm_symbols(
    fill = "Enseigne",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Enseigne"),
    shape = "Type_PV",
    shape.scale = tm_scale_categorical(values = TYPE_PV_SHAPES_TM),
    shape.legend = tm_legend(title = "Type point de vente"),
    col = "grey20",
    lwd = 0.4,
    size = 0.7,
    id = "siret",
    popup.vars = c("Enseigne", "Classe", "Type_PV")
  ) +
  tm_layout(title = "Zones de chalandise (à pied)",legend.outside = TRUE)

```

```{r, results='hide'}
iso600 <- iso %>% filter(time == 600)

iris_zone_etude$Nb_supermarches <- rowSums(
  ifelse(st_intersects(x = iris_zone_etude, y = iso600, sparse = FALSE), 1, 0)
)
```


### Zones de chalandise (en voiture)

```{r}
if (!is.null(otpcon) && !is.na(otp_port)) {
  otpcon <- tryCatch(
    otp_connect(hostname = "localhost", port = otp_port),
    error = function(e) otpcon
  )
}

if (!exists("sirene_zone_etude_otp")) {
  sirene_zone_etude_otp <- prepare_points_for_otp(sirene_zone_etude, id_col = "siret")
}

iso_car <- build_multiformat_isochrones(
  points_sf = sirene_zone_etude_otp,
  otpcon = otpcon,
  mode = c("CAR"),
  profile = "car",
  strict = strict_isochrones,
  id_col = "siret"
)

# rattacher l’enseigne
ref_enseigne <- sirene_zone_etude_otp %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  dplyr::select(siret, Enseigne) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

iso_car <- iso_car %>%
  dplyr::left_join(ref_enseigne, by = "siret") %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

iso_car$minutes <- iso_car$time / 60

# Zone primaire hierarchisee par format BIO (voiture):
# bio_enseigne = 8 min, bio_local = 8 min, alim_specialise = 10 min.
iso_primary_car <- iso_car %>%
  mutate(Type_PV = as.character(Type_PV)) %>%
  filter(
    (Type_PV == "bio_enseigne" & time == 8 * 60) |
      (Type_PV == "bio_local" & time == 8 * 60) |
      (Type_PV == "alim_specialise" & time == 10 * 60)
  )

```


```{r}
tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = "Pct_Menages_voiture",
    alpha = 0.5,
    palette = "Greens",
    style = "pretty",
    id = "iris_name",
    title = "% Ménages avec une voiture"
  ) +
  tm_shape(iso_car) +
  tm_fill(
    "minutes",
    breaks = c(0, 5.01, 10.01, 15.01, 20.01),
    title = "Isochrones voiture (minutes)",
    style = "fixed",
    labels = c("0 à 5", "5 à 10", "10 à 15", "15 à 20"),
    palette = "Oranges",
    id = "minutes",
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  tm_borders() +
  tm_shape(sirene_zone_etude_iso_plot) +
  tm_symbols(
    fill = "Enseigne",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Enseigne"),
    shape = "Type_PV",
    shape.scale = tm_scale_categorical(values = TYPE_PV_SHAPES_TM),
    shape.legend = tm_legend(title = "Type point de vente"),
    col = "grey20",
    lwd = 0.4,
    size = 0.7,
    id = "siret",
    popup.vars = c("Enseigne", "Classe", "Type_PV")
  ) +
  tm_layout(title= "Zones de chalandise (en voiture)", legend.outside = TRUE)

```

Row {data-height=500}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>

PARTIE 5.1: Recouvrement intra-enseigne (isochrones 2025)
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Tableau de recouvrement intra-enseigne

```{r}
iso_overlap_input <- iso_primary_car %>%
  st_make_valid() %>%
  mutate(
    siret = as.character(siret),
    Enseigne = if ("Enseigne" %in% names(.)) as.character(Enseigne) else NA_character_,
    groupe_reseau_nom = if ("groupe_reseau_nom" %in% names(.)) as.character(groupe_reseau_nom) else NA_character_
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    sirene_zone_etude_otp %>%
      st_drop_geometry() %>%
      transmute(
        siret = as.character(siret),
        groupe_reseau_nom_ref = if ("groupe_reseau_nom" %in% names(sirene_zone_etude_otp)) as.character(groupe_reseau_nom) else NA_character_,
        Enseigne_ref = if ("Enseigne" %in% names(sirene_zone_etude_otp)) as.character(Enseigne) else NA_character_,
        denomination_ref = if ("denominatio" %in% names(sirene_zone_etude_otp)) as.character(denominatio) else NA_character_
      ),
    by = "siret"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Enseigne = dplyr::coalesce(Enseigne, Enseigne_ref),
    groupe_reseau_nom = dplyr::coalesce(groupe_reseau_nom, groupe_reseau_nom_ref),
    groupe_reseau_nom = ifelse(
      groupe_reseau_nom %in% c("Groupe Auchan", "Groupe Casino"),
      "Groupe Auchan/Casino",
      groupe_reseau_nom
    ),
    groupe_reseau_nom = ifelse(
      is.na(groupe_reseau_nom) | str_squish(groupe_reseau_nom) == "" | groupe_reseau_nom == "Independant/Autre",
      map_group_reseau(Enseigne, denomination_ref),
      groupe_reseau_nom
    ),
    groupe_reseau_nom = ifelse(
      is.na(groupe_reseau_nom) | str_squish(groupe_reseau_nom) == "",
      "Independant/Autre",
      groupe_reseau_nom
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-any_of(c("Enseigne_ref", "groupe_reseau_nom_ref", "denomination_ref")))

message(
  "Recouvrement intra-enseigne: groupes detectes -> ",
  paste(sort(unique(na.omit(iso_overlap_input$groupe_reseau_nom))), collapse = ", ")
)

overlap_pairs <- list()
overlap_geoms <- list()
kk <- 0L

for (grp in unique(na.omit(iso_overlap_input$groupe_reseau_nom))) {
  sub <- iso_overlap_input %>% filter(groupe_reseau_nom == grp)
  if (nrow(sub) < 2) next

  inter_idx <- st_intersects(sub)
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(sub) - 1)) {
    j_candidates <- inter_idx[[i]]
    j_candidates <- j_candidates[j_candidates > i]
    if (length(j_candidates) == 0) next

    for (j in j_candidates) {
      # Intersection geometrique pure (sans attributs) pour eviter
      # les erreurs de recyclage de lignes sf quand plusieurs fragments
      # d'intersection sont retournes.
      inter_geom <- tryCatch(
        suppressWarnings(st_intersection(st_geometry(sub[i, ]), st_geometry(sub[j, ]))),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      if (is.null(inter_geom) || length(inter_geom) == 0) next

      inter_geom <- suppressWarnings(st_make_valid(inter_geom))
      inter_geom <- inter_geom[!st_is_empty(inter_geom)]
      if (length(inter_geom) == 0) next

      inter_union <- suppressWarnings(st_union(inter_geom))
      inter_union <- st_set_crs(inter_union, st_crs(sub))
      area_km2 <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(st_area(inter_union)) / 1e6)
      if (!is.finite(area_km2) || area_km2 <= 0) next

      kk <- kk + 1L
      overlap_pairs[[kk]] <- tibble::tibble(
        groupe_reseau_nom = grp,
        siret_i = as.character(sub$siret[i]),
        siret_j = as.character(sub$siret[j]),
        aire_recouvrement_km2 = area_km2
      )
      overlap_geoms[[kk]] <- st_sf(
        groupe_reseau_nom = grp,
        aire_recouvrement_km2 = area_km2,
        geometry = inter_union
      )
    }
  }
}

if (length(overlap_pairs) == 0) {
  overlap_pairs_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
    groupe_reseau_nom = character(),
    siret_i = character(),
    siret_j = character(),
    aire_recouvrement_km2 = numeric()
  )
  overlap_synthese <- tibble::tibble(
    groupe_reseau_nom = "Aucun recouvrement detecte",
    nb_recouvrements = 0L,
    aire_totale_km2 = 0
  )
  overlap_map_sf <- NULL
} else {
  overlap_pairs_tbl <- bind_rows(overlap_pairs)
  overlap_synthese <- overlap_pairs_tbl %>%
    group_by(groupe_reseau_nom) %>%
    summarise(
      nb_recouvrements = n(),
      aire_totale_km2 = round(sum(aire_recouvrement_km2), 4),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(nb_recouvrements), desc(aire_totale_km2))

  overlap_map_sf <- bind_rows(overlap_geoms) %>%
    group_by(groupe_reseau_nom) %>%
    summarise(
      aire_totale_km2 = sum(aire_recouvrement_km2),
      geometry = st_union(geometry),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

render_scroll_table(
  overlap_synthese,
  caption = "Recouvrement intra-enseigne 2025 (isochrones primaires voiture)",
  height_px = 320
)
```

### Carte synthèse du recouvrement intra-enseigne

```{r}
if (is.null(overlap_map_sf) || nrow(overlap_map_sf) == 0) {
  tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
    tm_borders(col = "grey70") +
    tm_layout(title = "Recouvrement intra-enseigne: aucun recouvrement detecte", legend.outside = TRUE)
} else {
  tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
    tm_borders(col = "grey75", lwd = 1) +
    tm_shape(overlap_map_sf) +
    tm_polygons(
      col = "groupe_reseau_nom",
      alpha = 0.45,
      border.col = "grey20",
      lwd = 1,
      title = "Groupe (recouvrement)"
    ) +
    tm_shape(sirene_zone_etude_iso_plot) +
    tm_symbols(
      shape = "Type_PV",
      shape.scale = tm_scale_categorical(values = TYPE_PV_SHAPES_TM),
      fill = "#37474F",
      col = "#263238",
      size = 0.55
    ) +
    tm_layout(title = "Synthese recouvrement intra-enseigne (2025)", legend.outside = TRUE)
}
```

Row {data-height=520}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>


```{r}
iso_primary_car_2025 <- iso_primary_car

# Accessibilite 2025 (methode de reference)
if (nrow(iso_primary_car_2025) == 0) {
  iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025 <- 0L
} else {
  iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025 <- rowSums(
    ifelse(
      st_intersects(
        x = iris_zone_etude,
        y = iso_primary_car_2025,
        sparse = FALSE
      ),
      1,
      0
    )
  )
}
iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture <- iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025

# Accessibilite 2020 (meme methode)
iso_primary_car_2020 <- sirene_zone_etude[0, ]
if (exists("sirene_zone_avant") && nrow(sirene_zone_avant) > 0) {
  sirene_zone_avant_otp <- tryCatch(
    prepare_points_for_otp(sirene_zone_avant, id_col = "siret"),
    error = function(e) {
      message("OTP prep 2020: ", conditionMessage(e))
      sirene_zone_avant[0, ]
    }
  )

  if (nrow(sirene_zone_avant_otp) > 0) {
    iso_car_2020 <- build_multiformat_isochrones(
      points_sf = sirene_zone_avant_otp,
      otpcon = otpcon,
      mode = c("CAR"),
      profile = "car",
      strict = strict_isochrones,
      id_col = "siret"
    )

    iso_primary_car_2020 <- iso_car_2020 %>%
      mutate(Type_PV = as.character(Type_PV)) %>%
      filter(
        (Type_PV == "bio_enseigne" & time == 8 * 60) |
          (Type_PV == "bio_local" & time == 8 * 60) |
          (Type_PV == "alim_specialise" & time == 10 * 60)
      )
  }
}

if (nrow(iso_primary_car_2020) == 0) {
  iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2020 <- 0L
} else {
  iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2020 <- rowSums(
    ifelse(
      st_intersects(
        x = iris_zone_etude,
        y = iso_primary_car_2020,
        sparse = FALSE
      ),
      1,
      0
    )
  )
}

# Couverture 2025/2020 en %
if (!exists("iris_id_col")) {
  iris_id_col <- if ("Code_IRIS" %in% names(iris_zone_etude)) "Code_IRIS" else "iris_code"
}

cov_2025 <- compute_coverage_pct(
  iris_sf = iris_zone_etude,
  iso_sf = iso_primary_car_2025,
  iris_id_col = iris_id_col
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(couverture_pct_2025 = couverture_pct)

cov_2020 <- compute_coverage_pct(
  iris_sf = iris_zone_etude,
  iso_sf = iso_primary_car_2020,
  iris_id_col = iris_id_col
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(couverture_pct_2020 = couverture_pct)

iris_zone_etude <- iris_zone_etude %>%
  dplyr::select(-any_of(c("couverture_pct_2025", "couverture_pct_2020", "couverture_pct"))) %>%
  left_join(cov_2025 %>% dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(c(iris_id_col, "couverture_pct_2025"))), by = iris_id_col) %>%
  left_join(cov_2020 %>% dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(c(iris_id_col, "couverture_pct_2020"))), by = iris_id_col) %>%
  mutate(
    couverture_pct_2025 = coalesce(couverture_pct_2025, 0),
    couverture_pct_2020 = coalesce(couverture_pct_2020, 0),
    couverture_pct = couverture_pct_2025
  )
```




PARTIE 6: Accessibilité
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Accessibilité IRIS

```{r}
tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = "Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture",
    palette = "Oranges",
    style = "pretty",
    id = "iris_name",
    title = "Nbre de points accessibles (zone primaire hierarchisee)"
  ) +
  tm_shape(sirene_zone_etude_iso_plot) +
  tm_symbols(
    fill = "Enseigne",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Enseigne"),
    shape = "Type_PV",
    shape.scale = tm_scale_categorical(values = TYPE_PV_SHAPES_TM),
    shape.legend = tm_legend(title = "Type point de vente"),
    col = "black",
    lwd = 0.8,
    size = 0.8,
    id = "siret",
    popup.vars = c("Enseigne", "Classe", "Type_PV")
  ) +
  tm_text(text = "iris_name", size = 0.8)+
  tm_layout(title = "Accessibilite IRIS (bio_enseigne>bio_local>alim_specialise)",legend.outside = TRUE)

```

### Accessibilité des points BIO/specialises (à pied)

```{r}
tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
  tm_polygons(
    col ="Nb_supermarches",
    style = "pretty",
    id = "iris_name",
    palette = "Oranges",
    labels = c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5"),
    title = "Nbre de points BIO/specialises accessibles en 10 min"
  ) +
  tm_text(text = "iris_name", size = 0.8) +
  tm_layout(title = "Accessibilité des points BIO/specialises (à pied)",legend.outside = TRUE)
```

Row {data-height=1120}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>

PARTIE 6.1: Couverture des IRIS
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------


```{r}
if (nrow(iso_primary_car) == 0) {
  message("Aucune isochrone primaire hierarchisee disponible: export d'un tableau vide par enseigne.")
  data_temp2 <- data.frame(iris_name = iris_zone_etude$iris_name)
} else {
  inter_mat <- st_intersects(iris_zone_etude, iso_primary_car, sparse = FALSE)
  data_temp <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(iris_zone_etude), ncol = nrow(iso_primary_car))

  for (j in seq_len(nrow(iso_primary_car))) {
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(iris_zone_etude))) {
      data_temp[i, j] <- ifelse(inter_mat[i, j], as.character(iso_primary_car$Enseigne[j]), 0)
    }
  }

  ens_uniques <- unique(as.character(iso_primary_car$Enseigne))
  ens_uniques <- ens_uniques[!is.na(ens_uniques) & ens_uniques != ""]

  data_temp2 <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(data_temp), ncol = length(ens_uniques))
  if (length(ens_uniques) > 0) {
    for (j in seq_along(ens_uniques)) {
      data_temp2[, j] <- apply(
        data_temp,
        1,
        function(x) length(which(x == ens_uniques[j]))
      )
    }
    data_temp2 <- as.data.frame(data_temp2)
    colnames(data_temp2) <- ens_uniques
    data_temp2$iris_name <- iris_zone_etude$iris_name
  } else {
    data_temp2 <- data.frame(iris_name = iris_zone_etude$iris_name)
  }
}

write.csv(data_temp2, file.path(processed_dir, "nb_pdv_iris_iso_primaire_hierarchie_2025.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}
iris_id_col <- if ("Code_IRIS" %in% names(iris_zone_etude)) {
  "Code_IRIS"
} else if ("iris_code" %in% names(iris_zone_etude)) {
  "iris_code"
} else {
  stop("Colonne identifiant IRIS introuvable (attendu: Code_IRIS ou iris_code).")
}

if (!"couverture_pct_2025" %in% names(iris_zone_etude)) {
  cov_2025 <- compute_coverage_pct(
    iris_sf = iris_zone_etude,
    iso_sf = iso_primary_car_2025,
    iris_id_col = iris_id_col
  ) %>%
    dplyr::rename(couverture_pct_2025 = couverture_pct)
  iris_zone_etude <- iris_zone_etude %>%
    left_join(cov_2025 %>% dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(c(iris_id_col, "couverture_pct_2025"))), by = iris_id_col)
}

if (!"couverture_pct_2020" %in% names(iris_zone_etude)) {
  cov_2020 <- compute_coverage_pct(
    iris_sf = iris_zone_etude,
    iso_sf = iso_primary_car_2020,
    iris_id_col = iris_id_col
  ) %>%
    dplyr::rename(couverture_pct_2020 = couverture_pct)
  iris_zone_etude <- iris_zone_etude %>%
    left_join(cov_2020 %>% dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(c(iris_id_col, "couverture_pct_2020"))), by = iris_id_col)
}

iris_zone_etude <- iris_zone_etude %>%
  mutate(
    couverture_pct_2025 = coalesce(as.numeric(couverture_pct_2025), 0),
    couverture_pct_2020 = coalesce(as.numeric(couverture_pct_2020), 0),
    couverture_pct = couverture_pct_2025
  )
```


### Couverture des IRIS

```{r}
tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "couverture_pct",
    fill_alpha = 0.5,
    fill.scale = tm_scale_continuous(),
    id = "iris_name",
    palette = "Greens",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Couverture (%)")
  ) +
  tm_text(text = "iris_name", size = 0.8) +
  tm_shape(sirene_zone_etude_iso_plot) +
  tm_symbols(
    fill = "Enseigne",
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Enseigne"),
    shape = "Type_PV",
    shape.scale = tm_scale_categorical(values = TYPE_PV_SHAPES_TM),
    shape.legend = tm_legend(title = "Type point de vente"),
    col = "grey20",
    lwd = 0.4,
    size = 0.7,
    id = "siret",
    popup.vars = c("Enseigne", "Classe", "Type_PV")
  ) +
  tm_layout(title = "Couverture des IRIS (zone primaire hierarchisee bio_enseigne>bio_local>alim_specialise)", legend.outside = TRUE)
```

Row {data-height=520}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>

PARTIE 6.2: Comparaison 2020 vs 2025 (accessibilite et couverture)
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=320}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Tableau comparatif 2020 vs 2025

```{r}
comparaison_2020_2025 <- tibble::tribble(
  ~indicateur, ~moyenne_2020, ~mediane_2020, ~moyenne_2025, ~mediane_2025, ~delta_moyenne,
  "Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture",
  mean(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2020), na.rm = TRUE),
  median(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2020), na.rm = TRUE),
  mean(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025), na.rm = TRUE),
  median(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025), na.rm = TRUE),
  mean(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025), na.rm = TRUE) -
    mean(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2020), na.rm = TRUE),
  "couverture_pct",
  mean(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$couverture_pct_2020), na.rm = TRUE),
  median(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$couverture_pct_2020), na.rm = TRUE),
  mean(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$couverture_pct_2025), na.rm = TRUE),
  median(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$couverture_pct_2025), na.rm = TRUE),
  mean(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$couverture_pct_2025), na.rm = TRUE) -
    mean(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$couverture_pct_2020), na.rm = TRUE)
) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3)))

render_scroll_table(
  comparaison_2020_2025,
  caption = "Comparaison verifiable 2020 vs 2025",
  height_px = 280
)
```

Row {data-height=460}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>

PARTIE 7: Autocorrelation spatiale
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------


### Voisins spatiaux

```{r}
spdep_ok <- requireNamespace("spdep", quietly = TRUE)
spatialreg_ok <- requireNamespace("spatialreg", quietly = TRUE)


nb_rook <- NULL
nb_knn <- NULL
nb_dist <- NULL
W_rook <- NULL
W_knn <- NULL
W_dist <- NULL

if (!spdep_ok) {
  info_tbl <- data.frame(
    etat = "Analyse de voisinage non executee",
    raison = "Le package spdep est absent. Installer spdep pour activer la Partie 7."
  )
  render_scroll_table(info_tbl, caption = "Etat de la Partie 7.1", height_px = 220)
} else {
  iris_spatial <- iris_zone_etude %>%
    sf::st_make_valid() %>%
    dplyr::select(iris_name, everything())

  if (is.na(sf::st_crs(iris_spatial))) {
    sf::st_crs(iris_spatial) <- 4326
  }

  iris_centroids <- sf::st_point_on_surface(sf::st_transform(iris_spatial, 4326))
  coords <- sf::st_coordinates(iris_centroids)

  # Rook (adjacence stricte)
  nb_rook <- spdep::poly2nb(sf::st_transform(iris_spatial, 2154), queen = FALSE)

  # K plus proches voisins
  k_val <- min(3, max(1, nrow(iris_spatial) - 1))
  nb_knn <- spdep::knn2nb(spdep::knearneigh(coords, k = k_val, longlat = TRUE))

  # Voisinage par distance: seuil calibre sur la distribution des distances KNN.
  knn_dists <- unlist(spdep::nbdists(nb_knn, coords, longlat = TRUE))
  d2 <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(knn_dists, probs = 0.9, na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(d2) || d2 <= 0) d2 <- max(knn_dists, na.rm = TRUE)
  nb_dist <- spdep::dnearneigh(coords, d1 = 0, d2 = d2, longlat = TRUE)
  if (any(spdep::card(nb_dist) == 0)) {
    d2 <- max(knn_dists, na.rm = TRUE)
    nb_dist <- spdep::dnearneigh(coords, d1 = 0, d2 = d2, longlat = TRUE)
  }

  W_rook <- spdep::nb2listw(nb_rook, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)
  W_knn <- spdep::nb2listw(nb_knn, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)
  W_dist <- spdep::nb2listw(nb_dist, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)

  voisinage_resume <- data.frame(
    methode = c("Rook", paste0("KNN (k=", k_val, ")"), paste0("Distance (<= ", round(d2, 2), " km)")),
    nb_liens = c(sum(spdep::card(nb_rook)), sum(spdep::card(nb_knn)), sum(spdep::card(nb_dist))),
    nb_iris_sans_voisin = c(sum(spdep::card(nb_rook) == 0), sum(spdep::card(nb_knn) == 0), sum(spdep::card(nb_dist) == 0))
  )
  render_scroll_table(
    voisinage_resume,
    caption = "Resume des structures de voisinage",
    height_px = 240
  )

  voisins_rook_sf <- sf::st_as_sf(spdep::nb2lines(nb_rook, coords = coords))
  sf::st_crs(voisins_rook_sf) <- sf::st_crs(iris_centroids)

  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = sf::st_transform(iris_spatial, 4326), fill = "grey96", color = "grey75", linewidth = 0.2) +
    geom_sf(data = voisins_rook_sf, color = "#2C7FB8", linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_sf(data = iris_centroids, color = "#084081", size = 1.2) +
    labs(
      title = "Voisinage spatial Rook (IRIS Grenoble + Nord)",
      subtitle = "Liaisons d'adjacence entre IRIS"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}
```

Row {data-height=760}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>

### Indices de concentration spatiale

```{r}
if (!spdep_ok || is.null(W_dist)) {
  info_tbl <- data.frame(
    etat = "Indices non calcules",
    raison = "Les objets de voisinage ne sont pas disponibles."
  )
  render_scroll_table(info_tbl, caption = "Etat de la Partie 7.2", height_px = 220)
} else {
  entropy_relative <- function(x) {
    x <- as.numeric(x)
    x[!is.finite(x)] <- 0
    N <- sum(x)
    if (!is.finite(N) || N <= 0) return(NA_real_)
    f <- x / N
    f <- f[f > 0]
    if (length(f) <= 1) return(0)
    E <- -sum(f * log(f))
    as.numeric(E / log(length(x)))
  }

  safe_moran <- function(x, listw) {
    x <- as.numeric(x)
    keep <- is.finite(x)
    if (sum(keep) < 3) return(list(I = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_))
    xk <- x[keep]
    if (stats::var(xk) == 0) return(list(I = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_))
    lw <- spdep::subset.listw(listw, subset = keep, zero.policy = TRUE)
    tst <- tryCatch(spdep::moran.test(xk, lw, zero.policy = TRUE), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(tst)) return(list(I = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_))
    list(
      I = as.numeric(tst$estimate[["Moran I statistic"]]),
      p_value = as.numeric(tst$p.value)
    )
  }

  y_total <- as.numeric(iris_zone_etude$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture)
  total_entropy <- entropy_relative(y_total)
  total_moran <- safe_moran(y_total, W_dist)

  if (exists("data_temp2") && "iris_name" %in% names(data_temp2)) {
    enseignes_counts <- data_temp2 %>%
      dplyr::select(-iris_name) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(everything(), ~ as.numeric(.x)))
  } else {
    enseignes_counts <- data.frame()
  }

  if (ncol(enseignes_counts) == 0) {
    indices_concentration <- data.frame(
      segment = "TOTAL",
      entropie_relative = total_entropy,
      moran_I = total_moran$I,
      moran_p_value = total_moran$p_value
    )
  } else {
    entropy_by_ens <- sapply(enseignes_counts, entropy_relative)
    moran_by_ens <- lapply(enseignes_counts, safe_moran, listw = W_dist)

    indices_concentration <- data.frame(
      segment = c("TOTAL", names(entropy_by_ens)),
      entropie_relative = c(total_entropy, as.numeric(entropy_by_ens)),
      moran_I = c(total_moran$I, sapply(moran_by_ens, function(x) x$I)),
      moran_p_value = c(total_moran$p_value, sapply(moran_by_ens, function(x) x$p_value))
    )
  }

  indices_concentration <- indices_concentration %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      entropie_relative = round(entropie_relative, 4),
      moran_I = round(moran_I, 4),
      moran_p_value = round(moran_p_value, 4)
    )

  render_scroll_table(
    indices_concentration,
    caption = "Indices de concentration spatiale",
    height_px = 360
  )

  grp_2020 <- ifelse(
    as.character(sirene_zone_avant$groupe_reseau_nom) %in% c("Groupe Auchan", "Groupe Casino"),
    "Groupe Auchan/Casino",
    as.character(sirene_zone_avant$groupe_reseau_nom)
  )
  grp_2025 <- ifelse(
    as.character(sirene_zone_etude$groupe_reseau_nom) %in% c("Groupe Auchan", "Groupe Casino"),
    "Groupe Auchan/Casino",
    as.character(sirene_zone_etude$groupe_reseau_nom)
  )

  HHI_2020 <- compute_hhi(grp_2020)
  HHI_2025 <- compute_hhi(grp_2025)

  entropie_grp <- function(g) {
    g <- g[!is.na(g) & str_squish(g) != ""]
    if (length(g) == 0) return(NA_real_)
    n <- as.numeric(table(g))
    p <- n / sum(n)
    if (length(p) <= 1) return(0)
    as.numeric(-sum(p * log(p)) / log(length(p)))
  }

  hhi_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
    annee = c(2020, 2025),
    HHI = c(HHI_2020, HHI_2025),
    entropie_relative_groupes = c(entropie_grp(grp_2020), entropie_grp(grp_2025)),
    nb_groupes = c(length(unique(na.omit(grp_2020))), length(unique(na.omit(grp_2025))))
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      HHI = round(HHI, 4),
      entropie_relative_groupes = round(entropie_relative_groupes, 4)
    )

  render_scroll_table(
    hhi_tbl,
    caption = "Concentration concurrentielle par groupes (HHI/entropie, 2020 vs 2025)",
    height_px = 240
  )
}
```

PARTIE 8: Carte des résidus OLS et Tests
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Test de Moran

```{r}

predictors_candidates <- c(
  "Pct_actifs",
  "Pct_Menages_enfants",
  "Pct_Menages_voiture",
  "Pct_Cadres_sup",
  "Mediane_euro",
  "Densite_pop"
)

predictors_ok <- predictors_candidates[predictors_candidates %in% names(iris_zone_etude)]
predictors_ok <- predictors_ok[sapply(predictors_ok, function(v) {
  vv <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(iris_zone_etude[[v]]))
  sum(is.finite(vv)) >= 5 && stats::var(vv[is.finite(vv)]) > 0
})]


if (length(predictors_ok) < 1) {
  moran_ols_tbl <- data.frame(
    voisinage = "NA",
    moran_I = NA_real_,
    p_value = NA_real_,
    note = "Aucun predicteur valide pour OLS"
  )
  render_scroll_table(
    moran_ols_tbl,
    caption = "Test de Moran sur residus OLS (variable cible: points accessibles en zone primaire)",
    height_px = 220
  )
} else {
  model_df <- iris_zone_etude %>%
    sf::st_drop_geometry() %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      y = as.numeric(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture),
      dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(predictors_ok), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))
    )

  complete_idx <- stats::complete.cases(model_df)
  model_cc <- model_df[complete_idx, , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(model_cc) < 8 || stats::var(model_cc$y) == 0) {
    moran_ols_tbl <- data.frame(
      voisinage = "NA",
      moran_I = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      note = "Donnees insuffisantes apres filtrage complet"
    )
    render_scroll_table(
      moran_ols_tbl,
      caption = "Test de Moran sur residus OLS (variable cible: points accessibles en zone primaire)",
      height_px = 220
    )
  } else {
    ols_formula <- stats::as.formula(paste("y ~", paste(predictors_ok, collapse = " + ")))
    ols_mod <- stats::lm(ols_formula, data = model_cc)

    W_rook_cc <- spdep::subset.listw(W_rook, subset = complete_idx, zero.policy = TRUE)
    W_dist_cc <- spdep::subset.listw(W_dist, subset = complete_idx, zero.policy = TRUE)
    W_knn_cc <- spdep::subset.listw(W_knn, subset = complete_idx, zero.policy = TRUE)

    moran_lm_safe <- function(mod, lw) {
      out <- tryCatch(
        spdep::lm.morantest(mod, lw, alternative = "two.sided", zero.policy = TRUE),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      if (is.null(out)) c(I = NA_real_, p = NA_real_) else c(
        I = as.numeric(out$estimate[["Observed Moran I"]]),
        p = as.numeric(out$p.value)
      )
    }

    t_rook <- moran_lm_safe(ols_mod, W_rook_cc)
    t_dist <- moran_lm_safe(ols_mod, W_dist_cc)
    t_knn <- moran_lm_safe(ols_mod, W_knn_cc)

    moran_ols_tbl <- data.frame(
      voisinage = c("Rook", "Distance", "KNN"),
      moran_I = c(t_rook["I"], t_dist["I"], t_knn["I"]),
      p_value = c(t_rook["p"], t_dist["p"], t_knn["p"])
    ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        moran_I = round(moran_I, 4),
        p_value = round(p_value, 4)
      )

    render_scroll_table(
      moran_ols_tbl,
      caption = "Test de Moran sur residus OLS (variable cible: points accessibles en zone primaire)",
      height_px = 260
    )

    iris_res <- iris_zone_etude
    iris_res$ols_res <- NA_real_
    iris_res$ols_res[complete_idx] <- stats::resid(ols_mod)

    ggplot() +
      geom_sf(data = iris_res, aes(fill = ols_res), color = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
      scale_fill_gradient2(
        low = "#2C7BB6",
        mid = "white",
        high = "#D7191C",
        midpoint = 0,
        na.value = "grey90",
        name = "Residus OLS"
      ) +
      labs(
        title = "Carte des residus OLS (accessibilite primaire)",
        subtitle = "Detection visuelle de structure spatiale residuelle"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  }
}

```

Row {data-height=780}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>


### Specification et estimation SAR/SEM

```{r}
if (!spdep_ok || !exists("model_cc") || !exists("ols_mod") || !exists("W_rook_cc")) {
  info_tbl <- data.frame(
    etat = "Modeles SAR/SEM non estimes",
    raison = "Prerequis indisponibles (spdep ou modele OLS non construit)."
  )
  render_scroll_table(info_tbl, caption = "Etat de la Partie 7.4", height_px = 220)
} else {
  lm_tests_obj <- tryCatch({
    if ("lm.LMtests" %in% getNamespaceExports("spdep")) {
      spdep::lm.LMtests(ols_mod, W_rook_cc, test = c("RLMerr", "RLMlag"), zero.policy = TRUE)
    } else if ("lm.RStests" %in% getNamespaceExports("spdep")) {
      spdep::lm.RStests(ols_mod, W_rook_cc, test = c("adjRSerr", "adjRSlag"), zero.policy = TRUE)
    } else {
      NULL
    }
  }, error = function(e) NULL)

  get_test_stat <- function(obj, nm) {
    if (is.null(obj) || is.null(obj[[nm]])) return(c(stat = NA_real_, p = NA_real_))
    c(
      stat = as.numeric(obj[[nm]]$statistic[[1]]),
      p = as.numeric(obj[[nm]]$p.value)
    )
  }

  rlm_err <- get_test_stat(lm_tests_obj, "RLMerr")
  rlm_lag <- get_test_stat(lm_tests_obj, "RLMlag")
  if (all(is.na(rlm_err))) rlm_err <- get_test_stat(lm_tests_obj, "adjRSerr")
  if (all(is.na(rlm_lag))) rlm_lag <- get_test_stat(lm_tests_obj, "adjRSlag")

  tests_tbl <- data.frame(
    test = c("Robust LM Error", "Robust LM Lag"),
    statistic = round(c(rlm_err["stat"], rlm_lag["stat"]), 4),
    p_value = round(c(rlm_err["p"], rlm_lag["p"]), 4)
  )
  render_scroll_table(
    tests_tbl,
    caption = "Tests robustes de specification spatiale (Rook)",
    height_px = 240
  )

  if (spatialreg_ok) {
    sar_mod <- tryCatch(
      spatialreg::lagsarlm(formula(ols_mod), data = model_cc, listw = W_rook_cc, zero.policy = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    sem_mod <- tryCatch(
      spatialreg::errorsarlm(formula(ols_mod), data = model_cc, listw = W_rook_cc, zero.policy = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    synth_mod <- data.frame(
      modele = c("OLS", "SAR", "SEM"),
      AIC = c(
        tryCatch(AIC(ols_mod), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        tryCatch(AIC(sar_mod), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        tryCatch(AIC(sem_mod), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
      param_spatial = c(
        NA_real_,
        if (!is.null(sar_mod)) as.numeric(sar_mod$rho) else NA_real_,
        if (!is.null(sem_mod)) as.numeric(sem_mod$lambda) else NA_real_
      ),
      note = c(
        "",
        if (!is.null(sar_mod)) "" else "SAR non convergent",
        if (!is.null(sem_mod)) "" else "SEM non convergent"
      )
    ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        AIC = round(AIC, 2),
        param_spatial = round(param_spatial, 4)
      )
  } else {
    synth_mod <- data.frame(
      modele = c("OLS", "SAR", "SEM"),
      AIC = c(round(tryCatch(AIC(ols_mod), error = function(e) NA_real_), 2), NA_real_, NA_real_),
      param_spatial = c(NA_real_, NA_real_, NA_real_),
      note = c(
        "",
        "Package spatialreg absent",
        "Package spatialreg absent"
      )
    )
  }

  render_scroll_table(
    synth_mod,
    caption = "Comparaison OLS/SAR/SEM (AIC et parametre spatial)",
    height_px = 280
  )
}
```

PARTIE 9: Top 4 zones preferables pour une nouvelle implantation
=======================================================================

```{r, results='hide'}
if (exists("iris_zone_etude")) {
  minmax01 <- function(x) {
    x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
    r <- range(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (!is.finite(r[1]) || !is.finite(r[2]) || r[1] == r[2]) return(rep(0.5, length(x)))
    (x - r[1]) / (r[2] - r[1])
  }

  row_weighted_mean <- function(df, cols, w) {
    m <- as.matrix(df[, cols, drop = FALSE])
    apply(m, 1, function(v) {
      ok <- is.finite(v)
      if (!any(ok)) return(NA_real_)
      sum(v[ok] * w[ok]) / sum(w[ok])
    })
  }

  cols_needed <- c(
    "1er_quartile_euro", "Mediane_euro", "3e_quartile_euro",
    "Pct_actifs", "Pct_Cadres_sup", "Pct_Menages_enfants", "Pct_Menages_voiture",
    "Densite_pop", "Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025",
    "couverture_pct_2025", "Nb_supermarches", "Nb_pdv_2025", "Nb_drives_2025"
  )
  cols_ok <- intersect(cols_needed, names(iris_zone_etude))

  candidats <- iris_zone_etude %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    dplyr::select(iris_name, com_name, dplyr::all_of(cols_ok)) %>%
    group_by(iris_name, com_name) %>%
    summarise(
      across(
        everything(),
        ~ {
          x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x))
          if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
        }
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025 = coalesce(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025, 0),
      couverture_pct_2025 = coalesce(couverture_pct_2025, 0),
      Nb_supermarches = coalesce(Nb_supermarches, 0),
      Nb_pdv_2025 = coalesce(Nb_pdv_2025, 0),
      Nb_drives_2025 = coalesce(Nb_drives_2025, 0)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      s_q1 = minmax01(`1er_quartile_euro`),
      s_mediane = minmax01(Mediane_euro),
      s_q3 = minmax01(`3e_quartile_euro`),
      s_actifs = minmax01(Pct_actifs),
      s_cadres = minmax01(Pct_Cadres_sup),
      s_familles = minmax01(Pct_Menages_enfants),
      s_voiture = minmax01(Pct_Menages_voiture),
      s_densite = minmax01(log1p(Densite_pop))
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      score_total_A = row_weighted_mean(
        cur_data(),
        c("s_q1", "s_mediane", "s_q3", "s_actifs", "s_cadres", "s_familles", "s_voiture", "s_densite"),
        c(0.12, 0.20, 0.10, 0.14, 0.10, 0.11, 0.10, 0.13)
      ),
      s_faible_concurrence_car = 1 - minmax01(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025),
      s_sous_couverture = 1 - minmax01(couverture_pct_2025),
      s_faible_presence_pdv = 1 - minmax01(Nb_pdv_2025),
      s_faible_drive = 1 - minmax01(Nb_drives_2025),
      score_offre_gap_B = row_weighted_mean(
        cur_data(),
        c("s_faible_concurrence_car", "s_sous_couverture", "s_faible_presence_pdv", "s_faible_drive"),
        c(0.38, 0.32, 0.22, 0.08)
      ),
      score_total_B = 0.62 * score_total_A + 0.38 * score_offre_gap_B,
      rank_A = rank(-score_total_A, ties.method = "first"),
      rank_B = rank(-score_total_B, ties.method = "first"),
      delta_rang_A_B = rank_A - rank_B,
      score_total_A_100 = round(score_total_A * 100, 1),
      score_total_B_100 = round(score_total_B * 100, 1)
    )

  ranking_a_top4 <- candidats %>%
    arrange(rank_A, iris_name) %>%
    slice_head(n = 4) %>%
    dplyr::select(rank_A, iris_name, com_name, score_total_A_100)

  ranking_b_top4 <- candidats %>%
    arrange(rank_B, iris_name) %>%
    slice_head(n = 4) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      rank_B, iris_name, com_name,
      score_total_B_100, score_total_A_100,
      Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025, couverture_pct_2025, Nb_pdv_2025, Nb_drives_2025
    )

  delta_rank_tbl <- candidats %>%
    mutate(abs_delta = abs(delta_rang_A_B)) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs_delta), rank_B) %>%
    dplyr::select(iris_name, com_name, rank_A, rank_B, delta_rang_A_B, score_total_A_100, score_total_B_100) %>%
    slice_head(n = 10)

  top4_implantation <- ranking_b_top4 %>%
    rename(
      rang = rank_B,
      score_total_100 = score_total_B_100
    )
}
```

Row {data-height=520}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Classement A (tache 2.2 uniquement) {data-width=33}

```{r}
if (!exists("ranking_a_top4")) {
  render_scroll_table(data.frame(info = "Classement A indisponible"), height_px = 220)
} else {
  render_scroll_table(ranking_a_top4, caption = "Top 4 - Classement A", height_px = 360)
}
```

### Classement B (taches 2.2 + 2.3) {data-width=33}

```{r}
if (!exists("ranking_b_top4")) {
  render_scroll_table(data.frame(info = "Classement B indisponible"), height_px = 220)
} else {
  render_scroll_table(ranking_b_top4, caption = "Top 4 - Classement B", height_px = 360)
}
```

### Delta de rang A vs B {data-width=34}

```{r}
if (!exists("delta_rank_tbl")) {
  render_scroll_table(data.frame(info = "Delta de rang indisponible"), height_px = 220)
} else {
  render_scroll_table(
    delta_rank_tbl,
    caption = "IRIS les plus impactes par l'ajout des indicateurs concurrence/accessibilite",
    height_px = 360
  )
}
```

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Carte des 4 zones prioritaires (classement B)

```{r}
if (!exists("top4_implantation") || nrow(top4_implantation) == 0) {
  plot.new()
  title("Top 4 indisponible")
} else {
  top4_join <- top4_implantation %>%
    dplyr::select(iris_name, rang, score_total_100)

  iris_top4_map <- iris_zone_etude %>%
    left_join(top4_join, by = "iris_name") %>%
    mutate(
      zone_top4 = ifelse(is.na(rang), "Autres zones", paste0("Top ", rang)),
      zone_top4 = factor(zone_top4, levels = c("Top 1", "Top 2", "Top 3", "Top 4", "Autres zones")),
      label_top4 = ifelse(is.na(rang), NA_character_, paste0("Top ", rang, " - ", iris_name))
    )

  tm_shape(iris_top4_map %>% filter(zone_top4 == "Autres zones")) +
    tm_polygons(
      col = "grey85",
      border.col = "white",
      lwd = 0.3,
      alpha = 0.9,
      title = "",
      legend.show = FALSE
    ) +
    tm_shape(iris_top4_map %>% filter(zone_top4 != "Autres zones")) +
    tm_polygons(
      col = "zone_top4",
      palette = c("#005F73", "#0A9396", "#94D2BD", "#E9D8A6"),
      style = "cat",
      border.col = "white",
      lwd = 0.6,
      alpha = 0.95,
      title = "Classement B"
    ) +
    tm_text(
      text = "label_top4",
      size = 0.7,
      col = "black",
      bg.color = "white",
      bg.alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    tm_layout(
      title = "Top 4 des zones d'implantation preferables (classement B)",
      legend.outside = TRUE
    )
}
```

Row {data-height=780}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>

PARTIE 10: CA potentiel (papersBIO + projection Top 1)
=======================================================================

```{r ca-data-build, results='hide'}
as_siret14_ca <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_squish(x)
  x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(str_replace_all(x, ",", ".")))
  x_num_txt <- ifelse(!is.na(x_num), format(x_num, scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE), NA_character_)
  x_digits_num <- str_replace_all(x_num_txt, "[^0-9]", "")
  x_digits_raw <- str_replace_all(x, "[^0-9]", "")
  x_digits <- ifelse(!is.na(x_digits_num) & x_digits_num != "", x_digits_num, x_digits_raw)
  x_digits[x_digits == ""] <- NA_character_
  out <- str_pad(str_sub(x_digits, 1, 14), width = 14, side = "left", pad = "0")
  out[is.na(x_digits)] <- NA_character_
  out
}

parse_fr_num <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\u00A0", " ")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "€", "")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\s+", "")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, ",", ".")
  x[x %in% c("", "NA", "N/A", "NULL")] <- NA_character_
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

first_non_na_num <- function(x) {
  y <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(y) == 0) NA_real_ else y[1]
}


ca_model_note <- "Modele non estime."
pred_ca_top1 <- NA_real_
top1_iris_name <- NA_character_
top1_code_iris <- NA_character_
implant_point <- NULL

feature_cols_ca <- c(
  "Mediane_euro", "Densite_pop", "Pct_actifs",
  "Pct_Menages_enfants", "Pct_Menages_voiture", "Pct_Cadres_sup",
  "Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025", "couverture_pct_2025",
  "Nb_supermarches", "Nb_pdv_2025", "Nb_drives_2025"
)

super_hyper_ca <- sirene_zone_etude %>%
  filter(as.character(Type_PV) %in% TYPE_PV_LEVELS) %>%
  mutate(
    siret14 = as_siret14_ca(siret),
    Enseigne = if ("Enseigne" %in% names(.)) as.character(Enseigne) else as.character(enseigne_de),
    Code_IRIS = as.character(Code_IRIS),
    capital_social_num = NA_real_,
    ca_2021 = NA_real_,
    ca_2024 = NA_real_
  )

pappers_ca_path <- file.path(raw_dir, "papersBIO.csv")
pappers_ca_loaded <- FALSE

if (file.exists(pappers_ca_path)) {
  pappers_ca <- suppressMessages(readr::read_delim(
    pappers_ca_path,
    delim = ";",
    col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character()),
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "UTF-8"),
    trim_ws = TRUE
  ))
  names(pappers_ca) <- iconv(names(pappers_ca), from = "", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  names(pappers_ca) <- tolower(names(pappers_ca))
  names(pappers_ca) <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "_", names(pappers_ca))
  names(pappers_ca) <- gsub("^_|_$", "", names(pappers_ca))

  if (!"ca_2021" %in% names(pappers_ca)) {
    ca21_alt <- names(pappers_ca)[grepl("^ca_?2021$", names(pappers_ca))]
    if (length(ca21_alt) > 0) names(pappers_ca)[names(pappers_ca) == ca21_alt[1]] <- "ca_2021"
  }
  if (!"ca_2024" %in% names(pappers_ca)) {
    ca24_alt <- names(pappers_ca)[grepl("^ca_?2024$", names(pappers_ca))]
    if (length(ca24_alt) > 0) names(pappers_ca)[names(pappers_ca) == ca24_alt[1]] <- "ca_2024"
  }

  req_ca <- c("siret", "capital_social", "ca_2021", "ca_2024")
  if (all(req_ca %in% names(pappers_ca))) {
    pappers_ca_loaded <- TRUE
    pappers_ca <- pappers_ca %>%
      mutate(
        siret14 = as_siret14_ca(siret),
        capital_social_num = parse_fr_num(capital_social),
        ca_2021 = parse_fr_num(ca_2021),
        ca_2024 = parse_fr_num(ca_2024)
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(siret14)) %>%
      group_by(siret14) %>%
      summarise(
        capital_social_num = first_non_na_num(capital_social_num),
        ca_2021 = first_non_na_num(ca_2021),
        ca_2024 = first_non_na_num(ca_2024),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    super_hyper_ca <- super_hyper_ca %>%
      left_join(pappers_ca, by = "siret14", suffix = c("", "_pappers")) %>%
      mutate(
        capital_social_num = dplyr::coalesce(capital_social_num, capital_social_num_pappers),
        ca_2021 = dplyr::coalesce(ca_2021, ca_2021_pappers),
        ca_2024 = dplyr::coalesce(ca_2024, ca_2024_pappers)
      ) %>%
      select(-any_of(c("capital_social_num_pappers", "ca_2021_pappers", "ca_2024_pappers")))
  }
}

crossref_candidates_ca <- c(
  file.path(processed_dir, "crossref_supermarches_drives_zone_v3.csv"),
  file.path(processed_dir, "crossref_supermarches_drives_zone.csv"),
  file.path(processed_dir, "crossref_supermarches_drives.csv")
)
crossref_ca_path <- crossref_candidates_ca[file.exists(crossref_candidates_ca)][1]

drive_ca <- tibble(siret14 = character(), drive_trouve = logical())
if (!is.na(crossref_ca_path)) {
  drive_ca <- readr::read_csv(crossref_ca_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      siret14 = as_siret14_ca(siret),
      drive_trouve = as.logical(drive_trouve)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(siret14)) %>%
    distinct(siret14, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(siret14, drive_trouve)
}

super_hyper_ca <- super_hyper_ca %>%
  left_join(drive_ca, by = "siret14") %>%
  mutate(drive_trouve = ifelse(is.na(drive_trouve), FALSE, drive_trouve))

iris_features_ca <- iris_zone_etude %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  mutate(Code_IRIS = as.character(Code_IRIS)) %>%
  select(any_of(c("Code_IRIS", feature_cols_ca, "iris_name"))) %>%
  group_by(Code_IRIS, iris_name) %>%
  summarise(across(any_of(feature_cols_ca), ~ {
    z <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x))
    if (all(is.na(z))) NA_real_ else mean(z, na.rm = TRUE)
  }), .groups = "drop")

if (exists("iris_res")) {
  iris_res_tbl <- iris_res %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    mutate(
      Code_IRIS = as.character(Code_IRIS),
      ols_resid_access = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ols_res))
    ) %>%
    group_by(Code_IRIS) %>%
    summarise(
      ols_resid_access = if (all(is.na(ols_resid_access))) NA_real_ else mean(ols_resid_access, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  iris_features_ca <- iris_features_ca %>%
    left_join(iris_res_tbl, by = "Code_IRIS")
} else {
  iris_features_ca <- iris_features_ca %>%
    mutate(ols_resid_access = NA_real_)
}

# Variables derivees de recouvrement/concentration locale par IRIS
# (issues de la matrice data_temp2 calculee en Partie 6)
if (exists("data_temp2") && is.data.frame(data_temp2) && "iris_name" %in% names(data_temp2)) {
  overlap_local <- data_temp2 %>%
    dplyr::as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(iris_name = as.character(iris_name))

  overlap_cols <- setdiff(names(overlap_local), "iris_name")
  overlap_cols <- overlap_cols[vapply(overlap_cols, function(v) {
    x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(overlap_local[[v]]))
    any(is.finite(x))
  }, logical(1))]

  if (length(overlap_cols) > 0) {
    overlap_mat <- as.matrix(overlap_local[, overlap_cols, drop = FALSE])
    mode(overlap_mat) <- "numeric"
    overlap_mat[!is.finite(overlap_mat)] <- 0

    row_tot <- rowSums(overlap_mat)
    hhi_local <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(overlap_mat))
    idx_pos <- row_tot > 0
    if (any(idx_pos)) {
      p <- overlap_mat[idx_pos, , drop = FALSE] / row_tot[idx_pos]
      hhi_local[idx_pos] <- rowSums(p^2)
    }

    overlap_local <- overlap_local %>%
      mutate(
        nb_enseignes_access = rowSums(overlap_mat > 0),
        recouv_intra_enseigne_local = rowSums(pmax(overlap_mat - 1, 0)),
        hhi_enseignes_local = hhi_local
      ) %>%
      select(iris_name, nb_enseignes_access, recouv_intra_enseigne_local, hhi_enseignes_local)

    iris_features_ca <- iris_features_ca %>%
      left_join(overlap_local, by = "iris_name")
  } else {
    iris_features_ca <- iris_features_ca %>%
      mutate(
        nb_enseignes_access = NA_real_,
        recouv_intra_enseigne_local = NA_real_,
        hhi_enseignes_local = NA_real_
      )
  }
} else {
  iris_features_ca <- iris_features_ca %>%
    mutate(
      nb_enseignes_access = NA_real_,
      recouv_intra_enseigne_local = NA_real_,
      hhi_enseignes_local = NA_real_
    )
}

super_hyper_ca <- super_hyper_ca %>%
  left_join(iris_features_ca %>% select(-iris_name), by = "Code_IRIS")

if (exists("top4_implantation") && nrow(top4_implantation) > 0) {
  top1_iris_name <- top4_implantation %>%
    filter(rang == 1) %>%
    slice_head(n = 1) %>%
    pull(iris_name)
}

if (!is.na(top1_iris_name) && "iris_name" %in% names(iris_zone_etude)) {
  top1_geom <- iris_zone_etude %>% filter(iris_name == top1_iris_name)
  if (nrow(top1_geom) > 0) {
    top1_union <- st_union(top1_geom)
    top1_centroid <- st_centroid(top1_union)
    top1_code_iris <- top1_geom %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% slice_head(n = 1) %>% pull(Code_IRIS) %>% as.character()

    implant_point <- st_sf(
      data.frame(
        iris_name = top1_iris_name,
        Code_IRIS = top1_code_iris,
        Type_PV = factor("notre_implantation", levels = c(TYPE_PV_LEVELS, "notre_implantation")),
        Enseigne = "Notre implantation",
        capital_social_num = NA_real_,
        ca_2021 = NA_real_,
        ca_2024 = NA_real_,
        pred_ca_2024 = NA_real_
      ),
      geometry = st_sfc(top1_centroid),
      crs = st_crs(iris_zone_etude)
    )
  }
}

make_ca_breaks <- function(x, n = 5) {
  vals <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  vals <- vals[is.finite(vals)]
  if (length(vals) == 0) return(c(0, 1))
  if (length(unique(vals)) == 1) {
    v <- unique(vals)[1]
    eps <- ifelse(abs(v) < 1, 1, abs(v) * 0.01)
    return(sort(unique(c(v - eps, v + eps))))
  }
  br <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(stats::quantile(vals, probs = seq(0, 1, length.out = n + 1), na.rm = TRUE)))
  br <- sort(unique(br))
  if (length(br) < 2) {
    br <- pretty(range(vals), n = n)
    br <- sort(unique(br))
  }
  if (length(br) < 2) {
    br <- c(min(vals), max(vals))
  }
  br
}

make_ca_labels <- function(breaks_vec) {
  if (length(breaks_vec) < 2) return(character())
  lo <- format(round(head(breaks_vec, -1), 0), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
  hi <- format(round(tail(breaks_vec, -1), 0), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
  paste0(lo, " - ", hi)
}

classify_ca_value <- function(value, breaks_vec) {
  if (!is.finite(value) || length(breaks_vec) < 2) return(NA_character_)
  labels <- make_ca_labels(breaks_vec)
  as.character(cut(value, breaks = breaks_vec, include.lowest = TRUE, labels = labels, right = TRUE))
}

build_ca_map <- function(points_sf, ca_var, map_title, implant_sf = NULL, implant_ca_value = NA_real_) {
  pts <- points_sf
  if (!"pred_ca_2024" %in% names(pts)) {
    pts$pred_ca_2024 <- NA_real_
  }
  if (nrow(pts) > 0) {
    pts <- pts %>%
      mutate(
        ca_value = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[ca_var]])),
        shape_cat = case_when(
          as.character(Type_PV) == "bio_enseigne" ~ "Bio enseigne",
          as.character(Type_PV) == "bio_local" ~ "Bio local",
          as.character(Type_PV) == "alim_specialise" ~ "Alim specialise",
          TRUE ~ "Autre"
        ),
        shape_cat = factor(shape_cat, levels = c("Bio enseigne", "Bio local", "Alim specialise", "Notre implantation")),
        point_label = paste0(siret14, " | ", Enseigne),
        pred_ca_2024 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(pred_ca_2024))
      )
  }

  if (!is.null(implant_sf) && nrow(implant_sf) > 0) {
    implant_plot <- implant_sf %>%
      mutate(
        ca_value = dplyr::case_when(
          is.finite(as.numeric(implant_ca_value)) ~ as.numeric(implant_ca_value),
          is.finite(as.numeric(pred_ca_2024)) ~ as.numeric(pred_ca_2024),
          TRUE ~ NA_real_
        ),
        shape_cat = factor("Notre implantation", levels = c("Bio enseigne", "Bio local", "Alim specialise", "Notre implantation")),
        point_label = paste0("Notre implantation | ", iris_name),
        Type_PV = "notre_implantation",
        siret14 = NA_character_,
        capital_social_num = NA_real_,
        Enseigne = "Notre implantation"
      )
    pts <- bind_rows(pts, implant_plot)
  }

  if (nrow(pts) > 0) {
    pts <- pts %>%
      mutate(
        shape_cat = case_when(
          shape_cat %in% "Bio enseigne" ~ "Bio enseigne",
          shape_cat %in% "Bio local" ~ "Bio local",
          shape_cat %in% "Alim specialise" ~ "Alim specialise",
          TRUE ~ "Notre implantation"
        ),
        shape_cat = factor(shape_cat, levels = c("Bio enseigne", "Bio local", "Alim specialise", "Notre implantation"))
      )
    pts <- separate_overlapping_points(pts, offset_m = 18)
  }

  ca_breaks <- make_ca_breaks(if ("ca_value" %in% names(pts)) pts$ca_value else numeric(), n = 5)
  ca_labels <- make_ca_labels(ca_breaks)
  ca_colors <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(c("#FFFFB2", "#FECC5C", "#FD8D3C", "#F03B20", "#BD0026"))(max(1, length(ca_labels)))
  ca_palette <- stats::setNames(c(ca_colors, "grey75"), c(ca_labels, "Missing"))
  if (nrow(pts) > 0) {
    pts <- pts %>%
      mutate(
        ca_class = as.character(cut(ca_value, breaks = ca_breaks, include.lowest = TRUE, labels = ca_labels, right = TRUE)),
        ca_class = ifelse(is.na(ca_class), "Missing", ca_class),
        ca_class = factor(ca_class, levels = c(ca_labels, "Missing"))
      )
  }

  m <- tm_shape(iris_zone_etude) +
    tm_polygons(col = "grey95", border.col = "grey80", lwd = 0.2, legend.show = FALSE)

  add_ca_layer <- function(map_obj, sf_layer, shape_code, show_color_legend = TRUE) {
    if (is.null(sf_layer) || nrow(sf_layer) == 0) return(map_obj)
    map_obj +
      tm_shape(sf_layer) +
      tm_symbols(
        col = "ca_class",
        palette = ca_palette,
        title.col = "CA observe / estime",
        legend.show = show_color_legend,
        legend.col.show = show_color_legend,
        fill.legend = if (show_color_legend) tm_legend(title = "CA observe / estime") else tm_legend_hide(),
        shape = shape_code,
        size = 0.65,
        border.col = "grey15",
        lwd = 0.4,
        id = "point_label",
        popup.vars = c("siret14", "Enseigne", "Type_PV", "capital_social_num", "ca_value", "ca_class", "pred_ca_2024")
      )
  }

  pts_bio_enseigne <- pts %>% filter(shape_cat == "Bio enseigne")
  pts_bio_local <- pts %>% filter(shape_cat == "Bio local")
  pts_alim_specialise <- pts %>% filter(shape_cat == "Alim specialise")
  pts_implant <- pts %>% filter(shape_cat == "Notre implantation")

  show_col_legend <- TRUE
  if (nrow(pts_bio_enseigne) > 0) {
    m <- add_ca_layer(m, pts_bio_enseigne, shape_code = 21, show_color_legend = show_col_legend)
    show_col_legend <- FALSE
  }
  if (nrow(pts_bio_local) > 0) {
    m <- add_ca_layer(m, pts_bio_local, shape_code = 24, show_color_legend = show_col_legend)
    show_col_legend <- FALSE
  }
  if (nrow(pts_alim_specialise) > 0) {
    m <- add_ca_layer(m, pts_alim_specialise, shape_code = 22, show_color_legend = show_col_legend)
    show_col_legend <- FALSE
  }
  if (nrow(pts_implant) > 0) {
    m <- add_ca_layer(m, pts_implant, shape_code = 25, show_color_legend = show_col_legend)
  }

  m +
    tm_add_legend(
      type = "symbols",
      title = "Type point de vente",
      shape = c(21, 24, 22, 25),
      labels = c("Bio enseigne", "Bio local", "Alim specialise", "Notre implantation")
    ) +
    tm_layout(
      title = map_title,
      legend.outside = TRUE
    )
}

ca_map_2021_data <- super_hyper_ca %>%
  filter(!is.na(ca_2021), !is.na(capital_social_num), capital_social_num < 1000000)

ca_map_2024_data <- super_hyper_ca %>%
  filter(!is.na(ca_2024), !is.na(capital_social_num), capital_social_num < 1000000)

ca_map_2021 <- build_ca_map(
  points_sf = ca_map_2021_data,
  ca_var = "ca_2021",
  map_title = "CA 2021 (capital social < 1M)",
  implant_sf = implant_point,
  implant_ca_value = pred_ca_top1
)

ca_map_2024 <- build_ca_map(
  points_sf = ca_map_2024_data,
  ca_var = "ca_2024",
  map_title = "CA 2024 (capital social < 1M)",
  implant_sf = implant_point,
  implant_ca_value = pred_ca_top1
)

ca_prediction_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  iris_cible = top1_iris_name,
  code_iris = top1_code_iris,
  type_implantation = "bio_enseigne",
  pred_ca_2024 = NA_real_,
  classe_carte_2024 = NA_character_,
  methode = NA_character_,
  statut = "En attente"
)

ca_predictor_screen_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  variable = character(),
  adj_r2_univ = numeric(),
  selected = logical()
)

if (pappers_ca_loaded) {
  train_ca <- super_hyper_ca %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    mutate(
      Type_PV = factor(as.character(Type_PV), levels = TYPE_PV_LEVELS),
      drive_trouve = as.integer(drive_trouve),
      Mediane_euro = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Mediane_euro)),
      Densite_pop = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Densite_pop)),
      Pct_actifs = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Pct_actifs)),
      Pct_Menages_voiture = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Pct_Menages_voiture)),
      Pct_Menages_enfants = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Pct_Menages_enfants)),
      Pct_Cadres_sup = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Pct_Cadres_sup)),
      Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025)),
      couverture_pct_2025 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(couverture_pct_2025)),
      Nb_supermarches = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Nb_supermarches)),
      Nb_pdv_2025 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Nb_pdv_2025)),
      Nb_drives_2025 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Nb_drives_2025)),
      ols_resid_access = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ols_resid_access)),
      nb_enseignes_access = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(nb_enseignes_access)),
      recouv_intra_enseigne_local = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(recouv_intra_enseigne_local)),
      hhi_enseignes_local = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(hhi_enseignes_local)),
      log_densite = log1p(pmax(Densite_pop, 0)),
      concurrence_inverse = 1 / (1 + pmax(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025, 0)),
      couverture_inverse = 100 - pmin(pmax(couverture_pct_2025, 0), 100),
      revenu_x_densite = Mediane_euro * log_densite,
      densite_x_actifs = log_densite * pmax(Pct_actifs, 0),
      super_ratio_local = Nb_supermarches / (1 + pmax(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025, 0)),
      access_x_cover = pmax(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025, 0) * pmax(couverture_pct_2025, 0),
      log_ca_2024 = log1p(pmax(as.numeric(ca_2024), 0))
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(ca_2024), !is.na(ca_2024))

  predictors_candidates_ca <- c(
    "Type_PV", "drive_trouve",
    "Mediane_euro", "Densite_pop",
    "Pct_actifs", "Pct_Menages_voiture", "Pct_Menages_enfants", "Pct_Cadres_sup",
    "Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025", "couverture_pct_2025",
    "Nb_supermarches", "Nb_pdv_2025", "Nb_drives_2025",
    "ols_resid_access", "nb_enseignes_access", "recouv_intra_enseigne_local", "hhi_enseignes_local",
    "log_densite", "concurrence_inverse", "couverture_inverse", "revenu_x_densite",
    "densite_x_actifs", "super_ratio_local", "access_x_cover"
  )

  pred_ok <- predictors_candidates_ca[predictors_candidates_ca %in% names(train_ca)]
  pred_ok <- pred_ok[vapply(pred_ok, function(v) {
    x <- train_ca[[v]]
    if (is.numeric(x)) {
      xx <- x[is.finite(x)]
      return(length(xx) >= 8 && stats::var(xx) > 0)
    }
    if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
      return(length(unique(na.omit(as.character(x)))) >= 2 && sum(!is.na(x)) >= 8)
    }
    FALSE
  }, logical(1))]

  if (length(pred_ok) >= 1) {
    score_candidate <- function(df, v) {
      sub <- df %>%
        select(log_ca_2024, all_of(v)) %>%
        filter(complete.cases(.))
      if (nrow(sub) < 8) return(NA_real_)
      fit <- tryCatch(stats::lm(as.formula(paste("log_ca_2024 ~", v)), data = sub), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(fit)) return(NA_real_)
      as.numeric(summary(fit)$adj.r.squared)
    }

    pred_scores <- vapply(pred_ok, function(v) score_candidate(train_ca, v), numeric(1))
    pred_rank <- names(sort(pred_scores, decreasing = TRUE, na.last = NA))
    max_pred <- max(2, min(6, floor(nrow(train_ca) / 3)))
    pred_selected <- unique(c(if ("Type_PV" %in% pred_rank) "Type_PV", pred_rank))
    pred_selected <- pred_selected[seq_len(min(length(pred_selected), max_pred))]

    ca_predictor_screen_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
      variable = pred_ok,
      adj_r2_univ = round(pred_scores[pred_ok], 4),
      selected = pred_ok %in% pred_selected
    ) %>%
      arrange(desc(selected), desc(adj_r2_univ))

    train_cc <- train_ca %>%
      select(log_ca_2024, ca_2024, all_of(pred_selected)) %>%
      filter(complete.cases(.))

    while (length(pred_selected) > 1) {
      min_n <- max(10, 2 * length(pred_selected) + 2)
      if (nrow(train_cc) >= min_n) break
      pred_selected <- pred_selected[-length(pred_selected)]
      train_cc <- train_ca %>%
        select(log_ca_2024, ca_2024, all_of(pred_selected)) %>%
        filter(complete.cases(.))
    }

    min_n <- max(10, 2 * length(pred_selected) + 2)
    if (nrow(train_cc) >= min_n && !is.na(top1_code_iris)) {
      
      # supprimer colonnes constantes (facteurs ou numériques)
      const_cols <- sapply(train_cc, function(x) length(unique(x)) < 2)
      
      train_cc <- train_cc[, !const_cols, drop = FALSE]
      
      # mettre à jour pred_selected pour ne garder que les colonnes encore présentes
      pred_selected <- intersect(pred_selected, names(train_cc))
      pred_selected <- setdiff(pred_selected, c("log_ca_2024","ca_2024"))
      
      lm_formula_ca <- as.formula(paste("log_ca_2024 ~", paste(pred_selected, collapse = " + ")))
      lm_fit_ca <- stats::lm(lm_formula_ca, data = train_cc)

      top1_feat <- iris_features_ca %>%
        filter(Code_IRIS == top1_code_iris) %>%
        slice_head(n = 1)

      if (nrow(top1_feat) == 1) {
        type_pv_levels <- if ("Type_PV" %in% names(train_cc)) levels(train_cc$Type_PV) else TYPE_PV_LEVELS
        new_obs <- tibble::tibble(
          Type_PV = factor("bio_enseigne", levels = type_pv_levels),
          drive_trouve = 0L,
          Mediane_euro = as.numeric(top1_feat$Mediane_euro),
          Densite_pop = as.numeric(top1_feat$Densite_pop),
          Pct_actifs = as.numeric(top1_feat$Pct_actifs),
          Pct_Menages_voiture = as.numeric(top1_feat$Pct_Menages_voiture),
          Pct_Menages_enfants = as.numeric(top1_feat$Pct_Menages_enfants),
          Pct_Cadres_sup = as.numeric(top1_feat$Pct_Cadres_sup),
          Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025 = as.numeric(top1_feat$Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025),
          couverture_pct_2025 = as.numeric(top1_feat$couverture_pct_2025),
          Nb_supermarches = as.numeric(top1_feat$Nb_supermarches),
          Nb_pdv_2025 = as.numeric(top1_feat$Nb_pdv_2025),
          Nb_drives_2025 = as.numeric(top1_feat$Nb_drives_2025),
          ols_resid_access = as.numeric(top1_feat$ols_resid_access),
          nb_enseignes_access = as.numeric(top1_feat$nb_enseignes_access),
          recouv_intra_enseigne_local = as.numeric(top1_feat$recouv_intra_enseigne_local),
          hhi_enseignes_local = as.numeric(top1_feat$hhi_enseignes_local)
        )

        new_obs <- new_obs %>%
          mutate(
            log_densite = log1p(pmax(Densite_pop, 0)),
            concurrence_inverse = 1 / (1 + pmax(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025, 0)),
            couverture_inverse = 100 - pmin(pmax(couverture_pct_2025, 0), 100),
            revenu_x_densite = Mediane_euro * log_densite,
            densite_x_actifs = log_densite * pmax(Pct_actifs, 0),
            super_ratio_local = Nb_supermarches / (1 + pmax(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025, 0)),
            access_x_cover = pmax(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture_2025, 0) * pmax(couverture_pct_2025, 0)
          )

        new_obs <- new_obs %>% select(all_of(pred_selected))
        if (all(complete.cases(new_obs))) {
          clamped_vars <- character()
          for (v in pred_selected) {
            if (is.numeric(train_cc[[v]]) && is.numeric(new_obs[[v]]) && is.finite(new_obs[[v]][1])) {
              lo <- suppressWarnings(min(train_cc[[v]], na.rm = TRUE))
              hi <- suppressWarnings(max(train_cc[[v]], na.rm = TRUE))
              if (is.finite(lo) && is.finite(hi)) {
                if (new_obs[[v]][1] < lo || new_obs[[v]][1] > hi) {
                  clamped_vars <- c(clamped_vars, v)
                }
                new_obs[[v]][1] <- max(min(new_obs[[v]][1], hi), lo)
              }
            }
          }

          pred_log <- suppressWarnings(stats::predict(lm_fit_ca, newdata = new_obs))
          pred_ca_top1 <- as.numeric(pmax(exp(pred_log) - 1, 0))
          map_breaks_2024 <- make_ca_breaks(c(ca_map_2024_data$ca_2024, pred_ca_top1), n = 5)
          pred_ca_class_2024 <- classify_ca_value(pred_ca_top1, map_breaks_2024)
          clamp_note <- if (length(clamped_vars) > 0) {
            paste0(" Variables hors plage d'apprentissage recadrees: ", paste(clamped_vars, collapse = ", "), ".")
          } else {
            ""
          }
          ca_model_note <- paste0(
            "LM estime sur CA_2024 (n=", nrow(train_cc), ", predicteurs=",
            paste(pred_selected, collapse = ", "),
            ", R2 ajuste=", round(summary(lm_fit_ca)$adj.r.squared, 3), ").",
            clamp_note
          )
          ca_prediction_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
            iris_cible = top1_iris_name,
            code_iris = top1_code_iris,
            type_implantation = "bio_enseigne",
            pred_ca_2024 = pred_ca_top1,
            classe_carte_2024 = pred_ca_class_2024,
            methode = "LM log(CA_2024) entraine sur Pappers",
            statut = "Estime"
          )
          if (!is.null(implant_point) && nrow(implant_point) > 0) {
            implant_point$pred_ca_2024 <- pred_ca_top1
          }
          ca_map_2021 <- build_ca_map(ca_map_2021_data, "ca_2021", "CA 2021 (capital social < 1M)", implant_point, implant_ca_value = pred_ca_top1)
          ca_map_2024 <- build_ca_map(ca_map_2024_data, "ca_2024", "CA 2024 (capital social < 1M)", implant_point, implant_ca_value = pred_ca_top1)
        } else {
          ca_model_note <- paste0(
            "Modele non estime: features manquantes pour l'IRIS top 1 (variables requises: ",
            paste(pred_selected, collapse = ", "), ")."
          )
        }
      } else {
        ca_model_note <- "Modele non estime: impossible de recuperer les features de l'IRIS top 1."
      }
    } else {
      ca_model_note <- paste0("Modele non estime: echantillon complet insuffisant (n=", nrow(train_cc), ", min=", min_n, ").")
    }
  } else {
    ca_model_note <- "Modele non estime: aucun predicteur exploitable apres controle de variance/NA."
  }
} else {
  ca_model_note <- "Modele non estime: fichier papersBIO.csv absent ou colonnes CA invalides."
}

ca_placeholder <- tibble::tibble(
  Code_IRIS = ifelse(is.na(top1_code_iris), NA_character_, top1_code_iris),
  iris_name = ifelse(is.na(top1_iris_name), NA_character_, top1_iris_name),
  population_cible = NA_real_,
  depense_alimentaire_par_menage = NA_real_,
  taux_capture_estime = NA_real_,
  ca_potentiel_estime = pred_ca_top1,
  source_donnees = ifelse(is.finite(pred_ca_top1), "Pappers + LM", "En attente nouvelles donnees"),
  statut = ifelse(is.finite(pred_ca_top1), "Estimation provisoire", "A completer")
)

ca_sources_placeholder <- tibble::tibble(
  source = c(
    "Pappers (CA par SIRET)",
    "SIRENE geolocalise (dataseed-sirene-1)",
    "IRIS INSEE + variables socio-demo",
    "Hypotheses CA potentiel (a completer)"
  ),
  usage = c(
    "Variable cible d'entrainement (CA_2021/CA_2024)",
    "Geolocalisation points BIO/specialises + typologie",
    "Predicteurs de la demande locale",
    "Parametrage final capture et conversion en CA potentiel"
  ),
  statut = c("Integre", "Integre", "Integre", "A finaliser")
)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
# Calcul theorique CA potentiel - Top 1 (formule menages x revenu median x coeff alimentaire)
ca_theo_iris_tbl <- tibble::tibble()
ca_theo_summary_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  indicateur = c(
    "CA_theorique_brut",
    "CA_theorique_corrige_surface",
    "IRIS_couverts_n",
    "IRIS_renseignes_n"
  ),
  valeur = NA_real_
)
ca_theo_capture_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  scenario = c("Prudent", "Central", "Haut"),
  taux_captation = c(0.10, 0.15, 0.20),
  ca_annuel_potentiel = NA_real_
)
ca_theo_note <- "Calcul theorique non disponible."

ca_theo_brut <- NA_real_
ca_theo_corrige <- NA_real_
ca_theo_capture_20 <- NA_real_

ca_map_2021_theo20 <- ca_map_2021
ca_map_2024_theo20 <- ca_map_2024

if (!is.null(implant_point) && nrow(implant_point) > 0 && exists("iris_agglo")) {
  implant_for_iso <- implant_point %>%
    mutate(
      siret = "IMPLANT_TOP1",
      Type_PV = factor("bio_enseigne", levels = TYPE_PV_LEVELS)
    )

  iso_top1 <- tryCatch(
    build_multiformat_isochrones(
      points_sf = implant_for_iso,
      otpcon = if (exists("otpcon")) otpcon else NULL,
      mode = c("CAR"),
      profile = "car",
      strict = FALSE,
      id_col = "siret"
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      message("CA theorique Top1 - isochrone fallback: ", conditionMessage(e))
      implant_for_iso[0, ]
    }
  )

  if (inherits(iso_top1, "sf") && nrow(iso_top1) > 0) {
    top1_zone <- iso_top1 %>%
      filter(as.numeric(time) == 8 * 60) %>%
      st_make_valid() %>%
      st_union() %>%
      st_as_sf()
  } else {
    # secours deterministe: 8 min voiture ~ 4 km
    top1_zone <- implant_for_iso %>%
      st_transform(2154) %>%
      st_buffer(dist = 4000) %>%
      st_transform(st_crs(iris_agglo)) %>%
      st_make_valid() %>%
      st_union() %>%
      st_as_sf()
  }

  iris_agglo_work <- iris_agglo %>%
    st_transform(st_crs(top1_zone)) %>%
    st_make_valid()

  iris_id_col_top1 <- if ("Code_IRIS" %in% names(iris_agglo_work)) {
    "Code_IRIS"
  } else if ("iris_code" %in% names(iris_agglo_work)) {
    "iris_code"
  } else if ("code_iris" %in% names(iris_agglo_work)) {
    "code_iris"
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (!is.na(iris_id_col_top1)) {
    inter_top1 <- suppressWarnings(st_intersection(iris_agglo_work, top1_zone))

    if (inherits(inter_top1, "sf") && nrow(inter_top1) > 0) {
      area_ref_tbl <- iris_agglo_work %>%
        mutate(
          Code_IRIS = as.character(.data[[iris_id_col_top1]]),
          area_iris = as.numeric(st_area(.))
        ) %>%
        st_drop_geometry() %>%
        select(Code_IRIS, area_iris) %>%
        distinct(Code_IRIS, .keep_all = TRUE)

      socio_top1 <- iris_data
      if (!"Code_IRIS" %in% names(socio_top1) && "CODE_IRIS" %in% names(socio_top1)) {
        names(socio_top1)[names(socio_top1) == "CODE_IRIS"] <- "Code_IRIS"
      }
      if (!"Code_IRIS" %in% names(socio_top1)) {
        socio_top1$Code_IRIS <- NA_character_
      }
      socio_top1 <- socio_top1 %>%
        mutate(Code_IRIS = as.character(Code_IRIS)) %>%
        select(any_of(c("Code_IRIS", "Menages", "Mediane_euro")))

      area_inter <- as.numeric(st_area(inter_top1))
      ca_theo_iris_tbl <- inter_top1 %>%
        st_drop_geometry() %>%
        mutate(
          Code_IRIS = as.character(.data[[iris_id_col_top1]]),
          iris_name = if ("iris_name" %in% names(.)) as.character(.data[["iris_name"]]) else NA_character_,
          com_name = if ("com_name" %in% names(.)) as.character(.data[["com_name"]]) else NA_character_,
          area_inter = area_inter
        ) %>%
        group_by(Code_IRIS, iris_name, com_name) %>%
        summarise(area_inter = sum(area_inter, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
        left_join(area_ref_tbl, by = "Code_IRIS") %>%
        mutate(
          part_surface_couverte_pct = ifelse(
            is.finite(area_iris) & area_iris > 0,
            pmin(100, pmax(0, 100 * area_inter / area_iris)),
            NA_real_
          )
        ) %>%
        left_join(socio_top1, by = "Code_IRIS") %>%
        mutate(
          Menages = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Menages)),
          Mediane_euro = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Mediane_euro)),
          coefficient_alimentaire = compute_coeff_alimentaire(Mediane_euro),
          depense_alimentaire_theorique = Menages * Mediane_euro * coefficient_alimentaire,
          depense_alimentaire_theorique_corrigee = depense_alimentaire_theorique * part_surface_couverte_pct / 100,
          iris_renseigne = is.finite(Menages) & Menages > 0 &
            is.finite(Mediane_euro) & Mediane_euro > 0 &
            is.finite(coefficient_alimentaire)
        ) %>%
        arrange(desc(part_surface_couverte_pct), desc(Menages)) %>%
        select(
          Code_IRIS, iris_name, com_name,
          part_surface_couverte_pct, Menages, Mediane_euro, coefficient_alimentaire,
```
