```{r, include=FALSE}
          depense_alimentaire_theorique, depense_alimentaire_theorique_corrigee, iris_renseigne
        )

      ca_theo_valid <- ca_theo_iris_tbl %>% filter(iris_renseigne)
      ca_theo_brut <- sum(ca_theo_valid$depense_alimentaire_theorique, na.rm = TRUE)
      ca_theo_corrige <- sum(ca_theo_valid$depense_alimentaire_theorique_corrigee, na.rm = TRUE)

      ca_theo_capture_tbl <- ca_theo_capture_tbl %>%
        mutate(ca_annuel_potentiel = ca_theo_corrige * taux_captation)
      ca_theo_capture_20 <- ca_theo_capture_tbl %>%
        filter(taux_captation == 0.20) %>%
        pull(ca_annuel_potentiel) %>%
        as.numeric()

      ca_theo_summary_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
        indicateur = c(
          "CA_theorique_brut",
          "CA_theorique_corrige_surface",
          "IRIS_couverts_n",
          "IRIS_renseignes_n"
        ),
        valeur = c(
          ca_theo_brut,
          ca_theo_corrige,
          nrow(ca_theo_iris_tbl),
          nrow(ca_theo_valid)
        )
      )

      ca_theo_note <- paste0(
        "Potentiel alimentaire theorique brut = ", format(round(ca_theo_brut, 0), big.mark = " ", scientific = FALSE),
        " EUR ; potentiel corrige par part de surface couverte = ", format(round(ca_theo_corrige, 0), big.mark = " ", scientific = FALSE),
        " EUR. Scenarios de captation: 10%=", format(round(ca_theo_capture_tbl$ca_annuel_potentiel[1], 0), big.mark = " ", scientific = FALSE),
        " EUR, 15%=", format(round(ca_theo_capture_tbl$ca_annuel_potentiel[2], 0), big.mark = " ", scientific = FALSE),
        " EUR, 20%=", format(round(ca_theo_capture_tbl$ca_annuel_potentiel[3], 0), big.mark = " ", scientific = FALSE), " EUR."
      )

      if (is.finite(ca_theo_capture_20)) {
        if (!is.null(implant_point) && nrow(implant_point) > 0) {
          implant_point$ca_theorique_20 <- ca_theo_capture_20
        }
        ca_map_2021_theo20 <- build_ca_map(
          points_sf = ca_map_2021_data,
          ca_var = "ca_2021",
          map_title = "CA 2021 + implantation (scenario captation 20%)",
          implant_sf = implant_point,
          implant_ca_value = ca_theo_capture_20
        )
        ca_map_2024_theo20 <- build_ca_map(
          points_sf = ca_map_2024_data,
          ca_var = "ca_2024",
          map_title = "CA 2024 + implantation (scenario captation 20%)",
          implant_sf = implant_point,
          implant_ca_value = ca_theo_capture_20
        )
      }
    }
  }
}

readr::write_csv(
  ca_theo_iris_tbl,
  file.path(processed_dir, "GROUPE07_ca_top1_iris_couverts_theorique_rapport2.csv"),
  na = ""
)
readr::write_csv(
  ca_theo_summary_tbl,
  file.path(processed_dir, "GROUPE07_ca_top1_resume_theorique_rapport2.csv"),
  na = ""
)
readr::write_csv(
  ca_theo_capture_tbl,
  file.path(processed_dir, "GROUPE07_ca_top1_capture_scenarios_rapport2.csv"),
  na = ""
)
message("Export rapport 2: GROUPE07_ca_top1_iris_couverts_theorique_rapport2.csv")
message("Export rapport 2: GROUPE07_ca_top1_resume_theorique_rapport2.csv")
message("Export rapport 2: GROUPE07_ca_top1_capture_scenarios_rapport2.csv")
```

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Carte CA 2021 {data-width=50}

```{r}
ca_map_2021
```

### Carte CA 2024 {data-width=50}

```{r}
ca_map_2024
```

Row {data-height=520}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Prediction CA - implantation Top 1 {data-width=33}

```{r}
ca_prediction_tbl <- ca_prediction_tbl %>%
  mutate(pred_ca_2024 = round(pred_ca_2024, 0))

render_scroll_table(
  ca_prediction_tbl,
  caption = "Prediction du CA 2024 pour notre magasin BIO (IRIS Top 1)",
  height_px = 220
)
```

### Selection des variables du modele {data-width=34}

```{r}
if (nrow(ca_predictor_screen_tbl) == 0) {
  render_scroll_table(
    data.frame(info = "Selection non disponible (modele non estime)."),
    caption = "Screening predicteurs",
    height_px = 220
  )
} else {
  render_scroll_table(
    ca_predictor_screen_tbl,
    caption = "Screening univarie des predicteurs (adj R2) et variables retenues",
    height_px = 220
  )
}
```

### Structure attendue (placeholder conserve) {data-width=33}

```{r}
render_scroll_table(
  ca_placeholder,
  caption = "Template CA potentiel (avec pre-remplissage Top 1 si disponible)",
  height_px = 220
)
```

Row {data-height=900}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

<div class="analysis-scroll-box analysis-scroll-box--long analysis-scroll-box--ca-scroll">
<p>Analyse à ajouter</p>
</div>

Row {data-height=260}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Sources / citations (placeholder)

```{r}
render_scroll_table(
  ca_sources_placeholder,
  caption = "Sources mobilisees pour la section CA (etat courant)",
  height_px = 220
)
```

Row {data-height=560}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Calcul 2 - Potentiel theorique (Top 1) {data-width=50}

```{r}
render_scroll_table(
  ca_theo_summary_tbl %>%
    mutate(valeur = ifelse(is.finite(valeur), round(valeur, 0), NA_real_)),
  caption = "Synthese formule: somme(Menages x Revenu median x Coefficient alimentaire)",
  height_px = 240
)
render_scroll_table(
  ca_theo_capture_tbl %>%
    mutate(
      taux_captation = paste0(round(100 * taux_captation, 0), "%"),
      ca_annuel_potentiel = ifelse(is.finite(ca_annuel_potentiel), round(ca_annuel_potentiel, 0), NA_real_)
    ),
  caption = "Scenarios de captation (10%, 15%, 20%)",
  height_px = 220
)
```

### IRIS couverts par la chalandise Top 1 {data-width=50}

```{r}
render_scroll_table(
  ca_theo_iris_tbl %>%
    mutate(
      part_surface_couverte_pct = round(part_surface_couverte_pct, 2),
      Mediane_euro = round(Mediane_euro, 0),
      coefficient_alimentaire = round(coefficient_alimentaire, 2),
      depense_alimentaire_theorique = round(depense_alimentaire_theorique, 0),
      depense_alimentaire_theorique_corrigee = round(depense_alimentaire_theorique_corrigee, 0)
    ),
  caption = "Details IRIS: couverture, menages, revenu median, coefficient alimentaire",
  height_px = 470
)
```

Row {data-height=180}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire calcul theorique

```{r, results='asis'}
cat("- ", ca_theo_note, "\n", sep = "")
```

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Carte CA 2021 (scenario 20%) {data-width=50}

```{r}
ca_map_2021_theo20
```

### Carte CA 2024 (scenario 20%) {data-width=50}

```{r}
ca_map_2024_theo20
```
